# HERMES TRADING — MASTER REBUILD BLUEPRINT (v4)

**v4 changes (this release):** fixed a real bug in the L27 partial-profit guard
description (it had been conflated with the separate L26 breakeven trigger —
see Section 3 and Section 5), and updated the Open Items Registry to reflect
that three previously-flagged "not found in source" items were actually
already resolvable from this document's own Section 3 / Appendix A content
(re-entry cooldown, chart-cooldown line refs, partial-close trigger), plus
upgraded the 300-candle seed-history claim from ASSUMED to VERIFIED. These
fixes were surfaced by cross-checking this blueprint line-by-line against
`HERMES_REBUILD_EXECUTION_ROADMAP_v4.md`'s citations. No other content changed
from v2.

**Purpose:** single source of truth for a clean, from-scratch rebuild of Hermes
Trading (forex + gold + crypto self-trading / self-improving system), replacing
the previous ad-hoc, bug-prone build with a structured, test-gated one.

**This v2 edit does not change or remove any technical content from v1.** It adds
navigation, consolidates scattered "unverified / not-found" flags into one place,
and adds an explicit multi-session usage guide, because the source document is
~20,700 lines and must not be pasted into a single context window at once.

Original v1 generated by reading every source file in the prior system
(hermes-forex, hermes-gold, hermes-crypto, dashboard, hermes-dashboard-api) plus
all strategy YAMLs, state files, and the three master docs (CHANGELOG.md,
COMPONENT_REGISTRY.md, hermes_trading_system_summary.md).

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HOW TO USE THIS DOCUMENT ACROSS MULTIPLE SESSIONS
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

This file is a **reference library**, not a single prompt. Do not paste the
whole file into one chat/session. Instead:

1. **Planning / architecture work** → use PART 1 only (Sections 1–11, ~1,600
   lines). This is small enough to load in full when discussing scope, sequence,
   or design decisions.
2. **Building a specific phase** → open PART 2 (Section 7) to find the phase,
   then pull in ONLY the specific Appendix A file(s) it references (e.g. Phase 3
   needs only the indicator functions from `loop.py`, not the whole 2,650-line
   file). Use the Appendix A file index (below) to jump straight to the file you
   need.
3. **Verifying a claim** → check the OPEN ITEMS REGISTRY first. If the fact you
   need is listed there as NOT FOUND / ASSUMED / UNVERIFIED, go re-check the
   live source repo before trusting the blueprint's number — don't propagate an
   assumed value into new code.
4. **Never treat Appendix A as something to "keep in context" for the whole
   rebuild.** It exists so you (or a future session) can grep/search it later,
   not so it gets re-read top to bottom.

OPEN ITEMS REGISTRY (consolidated — v4)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Every fact in this blueprint that is NOT directly confirmed against source code
is listed here. Nothing else in the document should be treated as unverified —
if it's not in this table, verification confirmed it against the actual repo
(or, for rows marked RESOLVED, against Appendix A's embedded source). Resolve
remaining OPEN rows against the live codebase; do not silently assume a
bracketed value is correct.

**v4 changelog for this table:** cross-checking this blueprint against
`HERMES_REBUILD_EXECUTION_ROADMAP_v3.md`'s citations surfaced that rows #1,
#4, and #5 below were false positives — Section 3 (L15, L23, L27) and
Appendix A already contained the resolving source lines; the v2 registry
simply hadn't been cross-referenced against them yet. Row #2 is now confirmed
rather than assumed. Rows #3, #6, #7, #8 remain genuinely open. Resolving row
#5 also surfaced and fixed an actual bug in Section 3's L27 description (see
Section 3 and the Section 5 checklist, both corrected in this v4).

| # | Where it's used            | Claim                                             | Status | Detail |
|---|-----------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|--------|----------------------|
| 1 | Phase 4 build target (S7)   | Re-entry cooldown mechanics (stopped-out pairs)     | RESOLVED (v4) | Section 3 L15: 30-cycle cooldown after stop-out, lines 2033-2037; L23: stop-loss-exit cooldown, lines 1688-1690. Appendix A confirms the `remaining/30 cycles` check at ~3811-3815 and ~3946-3950. |
| 2 | Phase 2 test (S7)           | `seed_history()` returns up to 300 candles          | VERIFIED (v4, upgraded from ASSUMED) | Appendix A `seed_forex_price_history`: `_price_histories[pair] = closes[-300:]` — 300 is a real cap confirmed in source (fewer than 300 only if fewer candles are available that day). |
| 3 | Phase 3 test (S7)           | Hand-computed RSI = 47.3 for the sample series      | STILL OPEN — ASSUMED | Test-fixture value tied to a specific sample series defined in the test itself, not a lookup against existing behavior. Recompute against the real Wilder-RSI implementation at test-writing time; do not trust 47.3 as-is. |
| 4 | Phase 4 build target (S7)   | Chart hard-block / re-entry cooldown line refs      | RESOLVED (v4) | Same resolution as #1. |
| 5 | Phase 5-ish (S7)            | Partial-close trigger point                          | RESOLVED (v4) — and a bug fixed | Confirmed at full `profit_target_pct`, NOT half and NOT `idx-ei>=60`/hold_cycles-gated (Appendix A ~3374-3379). The earlier "profit_target/2" framing was actually describing the separate L26 breakeven trigger — now corrected in Section 3 and the Section 5 checklist. |
| 6 | Section 6 design (S7 notes) | Engine health registry                              | NEW IN REBUILD (no current-source equivalent) | Deliberate v2-architecture addition, not a verification gap — don't confuse it for existing behavior. |
| 7 | Section 11.1 (GP engine)    | "Shared indicators get 50% weight" across bots      | STILL OPEN — UNVERIFIED, likely false | Do NOT build this into the rebuild; the 0.5 constants found are stop-loss clamps / WR thresholds / the L26 breakeven multiplier (see corrected L27 above), not a shared-weight rule. |
| 8 | Section 11.4 summary table  | Same claim as #7, tabulated                          | STILL OPEN — UNVERIFIED | Same as #7. |

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (new in v2 — one page orientation)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
**What this system is:** a self-trading, self-improving bot family (forex,
gold, crypto) that enters/exits trades algorithmically, then periodically
reflects on its own trade history (rule-based + 3-model LLM consensus) to
propose and backtest-validate parameter changes to itself.

**Why the rebuild:** the current system works but grew unstructured — two
~2,600-line `loop.py` files 95% duplicated across forex/gold, state files mixed
into the code repos, gold running the wrong strategy type, dead crypto-specific
adapters left in the gold bot, and a GP-scoring default that creates a
chicken-and-egg deadlock for new pairs. None of these are exotic bugs — they're
structural debt from organic growth. Full list: Section 4 (P1–P9).

**What must survive the rebuild unchanged:** every entry/exit rule, all ~66
enumerated guard layers (Section 3), the 3-model LLM reflection consensus, the
7-phase backtest validation pipeline, and the exact per-pair session/strategy
config. Full contract: Section 5.

**The new architecture in one line:** one shared `hermes_core` engine package;
each bot (forex/gold/crypto) is a config instance, not a code fork; state lives
on a separate persistent volume, never inside the code repo. Full design:
Section 6.

**How to build it:** Section 7's 18 phases, in order, each with its own pytest
cases and an explicit failure definition — do not start Phase N+1 until Phase
N's tests pass. This sequencing (config → price adapter → indicators → entry →
exit → risk → loop → reflection → backtest → GP → …) is the single most
important discipline for avoiding a repeat of the original bug-prone build.

**Top structural fixes carried into the rebuild:**
  1. Single shared engine package (kills P1 duplication-drift).
  2. State on its own volume, code read-only (kills P2 redeploy data-loss risk).
  3. Gold/silver switched from mean-reversion to momentum strategy (fixes P3 —
     wrong instrument fit).
  4. Dead crypto adapters removed from gold bot (fixes P4).
  5. GP `gp_entry_score` default changed from −0.3 to 0.0 (fixes the
     chicken-and-egg deadlock in Section 11, Problem 3).
  6. Cron parameterized by bot config instead of a forex-only cross-repo import
     (fixes P8 / Section 11 Problem 2).

**Known false lead — do not chase:** Section 11 Problem 1 ("dual data contract,
list vs dict") was investigated and found to be a phantom bug; the existing
code already handles both formats. Don't budget rebuild time for it.



SECTION 1: CURRENT SYSTEM INVENTORY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Repo layout (real, on D:/projects):
  hermes-forex/        -> package hermes_forex/    (EUR/USD, GBP/USD, GBP/JPY, AUD/USD)
  hermes-gold/         -> package hermes_trading/  (XAU/USD, XAG/USD)  [+ crypto-style adapters macro/news/onchain]
  hermes-crypto/       -> package hermes_crypto/   (BTC/USD, ETH/USD)  [FULL BOT - same architecture]
  dashboard/           -> backend/main.py (FastAPI) + frontend/ (React/Vite)
  hermes-dashboard-api/-> standalone audit API (hermes-audit)
  hermes_gp_cron.py    -> root cron (imports hermes_forex.backtest)
  hermes_heartbeat.py  -> root heartbeat monitor (imports nothing local)

─────────────────────────────────────────────
1.1 PYTHON FILES — FOREX BOT (hermes_forex)
─────────────────────────────────────────────

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/loop.py  (2650 lines)
Purpose: Main 60-second trading loop for the forex bot — fetches prices, runs
all entry filters, manages open trades/exits, calls every other engine, writes
heartbeat, pushes to dashboard, spawns reflection.
Key functions (signatures verbatim; one-line desc):
- _load_discord_webhooks() — Lazy-load webhook URLs from state files if env not set.
- _recover_trades_from_dashboard() — On restart, restore trades.jsonl from dashboard API if local empty.
- _seed_default_state() — On startup, create default state files if volume empty.
- _get_gp_intel() — Return GpIntelligence singleton.
- _load_safety_state() — Load flatline + consecutive-loss + stop-loss-blocklist + discovery ts from disk.
- _save_safety_state() — Persist those four structures to disk.
- _load_reflection_latches() / _save_reflection_latches(latches) — Per-pair reflection done-latches.
- _is_reflection_done(pair, closed_count) / _mark_reflection_done(pair, closed_count) — Reflection once-per-N-trades latch.
- _strategy_filename(pair) / load_strategy_for_pair(pair) / load_goal() / load_trades() — Config + state loaders.
- _atomic_write(path, data, mode) — Atomic file write (temp+rename).
- write_heartbeat(asset, cycle, consecutive_failures, last_price) — Heartbeat JSON writer.
- _get_session(hour) / _get_day_name(ts_iso) — Session/day classification.
- compute_rsi(prices, period) / compute_roc(prices, period) / compute_atr(prices, period) / compute_avg_volume(volumes, period) — Indicators.
- compute_regime(prices) — 50/200 MA regime (BULL/BEAR/NEUTRAL).
- compute_regime_fast(prices) — 20/50 EMA fast regime.
- compute_rsi_divergence(prices, period) — Bullish divergence detector.
- compute_entry_quality_score(... 10 args ...) — Entry quality 0-10 scorer.
- _fetch_calendar_events() / _get_zones_for_pair(pair) / _is_fomc_week() / _is_first_friday() / _is_near_economic_event(pair) — Economic-calendar guards (Layer 19).
- _extract_features(prices, volumes, pair) — 9-float feature vector (or None if <60 candles).
- _normalize_features / _compute_novelty_score / _is_novel_regime — Novelty/regime-anomaly detection.
- _update_consecutive_losses(pair, exit_reason) — Consecutive-loss counter → flatline action.
- _check_spread(pair, current_price, stop_loss_pct) — Spread-vs-stop guard.
- _log_flatline(pair, reason, details) — Flatline event logger.
- _get_daily_rsi_bonus(pair) — Daily RSI confluence bonus [-1,0,+1].
- session_quality_bonus() — Session quality bonus.
- check_correlation(pairs, rsi_values, thresholds) — Multi-pair oversold confluence.
- compute_adx(prices, period) / compute_bollinger(prices, period, num_std) — ADX + Bollinger.
- is_ny_session() / is_london_session() / is_asian_session() — Session window checks (NY 13-22, LDN 08-17, ASIA 00-08 UTC).
- get_pairs() / load_skipped() / save_skipped(skipped) / log_skip(pair, reason, rsi, price, regime, adx) — Skip ledger.
- _noop(*a, **kw) — No-op placeholder.
Imports: hermes_forex.adapters.price, .backtest, .chart_vision, .crisis_learning, .decision_cortex, .gp_intelligence, .policy_engine, .reflect.
Imported by: run.py (main entry), and dynamically by other modules via `from hermes_forex.loop import ...`.
Known bugs:
  • Duplicate of hermes-gold/.../loop.py (≈95% identical) — copy-paste drift.
  • HEARTBEAT "market_closed" var referenced at line 2624 but set elsewhere; stale-candle guard is the real fix for weekend pollution.
  • Recovers 128 trades from dashboard on restart; relies on dashboard being up — single point of failure.
  • ENTRY_THRESHOLD env only applies to rsi_momentum pairs (line 1862), not MR pairs.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/reflect.py  (2136 lines)
Purpose: Reflection engine — L1 rule-based (one-variable) + L2 3-model LLM
consensus; validates proposals via 7-phase backtest; auto-reverts; self-heals pauses.
Key functions:
- estimate_cycle() / run_safety_checks(symbol, trades, goal) — Pre-reflection safety gate.
- restore_strategy_backup(symbol) / load_yaml(path) / save_yaml(path, data) — YAML IO.
- is_contaminated(trade) [GOLD ONLY] / load_trades(exclude_contaminated) / strategy_filename(symbol) — Trade load (+ contamination filter in gold).
- validate_strategy_params(strategy, raise_on_fail) — Hard gate: ALL params within safe ranges (STRATEGY_PARAM_RANGES).
- score_trades(trades, goal) — Composite 0-100 score.
- layer1_rule_based(symbol, trades, goal, strategy, all_trades) — L1: returns (var,old,new,reason,confidence).
- call_gemini / call_groq / call_deepseek / call_llm_consensus — LLM wrappers + 3-model voting.
- parse_gemini_response(text) — Parse structured JSON from Gemini.
- layer2_gemini(symbol, trades, goal, strategy, score, chart_context, skipped_json, crisis_data, force_strategy_review) — L2 analysis.
- check_historical_hypotheses / strategy_to_blocks / fetch_backtest_prices — Backtest prep.
- load_strategy_knowledge / save_strategy_knowledge / check_strategy_knowledge / log_backtest_result / check_knowledge_base_for_change / update_strategy_knowledge — Knowledge base (prevents repeating bad changes).
- update_hypothesis_scores(symbol) — Rescore pending hypotheses.
- validate_proposal(param, old_val, new_val, trades, prices) — Bar-by-bar backtest validation.
- _llm_validate_backtest(...) — LLM resolves marginal verdicts (DeepSeek→Gemini→Groq).
- auto_revert(symbol, trades, strategy) — Revert if current version underperforms prior.
- _log_regime_action / maybe_auto_unpause(symbol, strategy) — Self-healing unpause (EVERY cycle).
- combined_reflect(symbol, trades, goal, chart_context, skipped_json, crisis_data) — 2-layer orchestrator.
- main() / _safe_stop_pct(val) / _safe_target_pct(val) — Clamp helpers.
LLM models (verbatim from source):
  GEMINI_MODEL = "gemini-2.5-pro"
  GROQ_MODEL   = "deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b"   (Groq hosts DeepSeek distill)
  DEEPSEEK_MODEL = "deepseek-chat"
  Consensus = 2/3 voting; score guard ≥55 (line 340: "Lowered from 65 for version-specific data") gates L1→L2.
Imports: .backtest, .crisis_learning, .decision_cortex, .policy_engine.
Imported by: loop.py (subprocess spawn).
Known bugs:
  • score_trades score>=55 gate (line 340) lowered from 65 — weakens strong-pair protection.
  • is_contaminated only in GOLD copy — forex copy lacks it, so forex can't strip bugged trades.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/backtest.py  (2031 lines)
Purpose: 7-phase backtest/validation pipeline + symbolic GP discovery +
discovered-indicator registry + shadow/live promotion + degradation tracker.
Classes: SimResult(__init__, __repr__, _get, sim).
Key functions (selected): backtest_trade, compare_param_changes, batch_backtest,
crisis_backtest, backtest_with_history (OOS + crisis + regime + alpha),
alpha_decomposition, simulate_custom_strategy, evolve_strategy(_crossover),
discover_indicator, register_discovered_indicator, init_discovered_storage,
load/save_discovered_indicators, record_indicator_shadow, shadow_scorecard,
evaluate_shadow_signals, promote_indicator, retire_indicator,
record_signal_outcome, get_indicator_live_wr, check_discovered_signals.
Imports: hermes_data, .backtest (self), .crisis_learning, .genetic_discovery.
Imported by: loop.py, reflect.py, genetic_discovery.py, decision_cortex.py, gp_cron.
Known bugs:
  • CRITICAL CROSS-REPO IMPORT: hermes-gold/.../backtest.py imports `hermes_forex.backtest`
    (and itself as hermes_trading.backtest). Gold bot cannot run standalone.
  • _eval_expr uses `data` as flat list (backward-compat) but genetic_discovery.py
    passes dict — dual contract risk.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/genetic_discovery.py  (843 lines)
Purpose: Symbolic GP — evolve mathematical indicators via genetic programming,
walk-forward validation, permutation p-value, correlation-with-forward-return fitness.
Key functions: _ema, _random_tree, _eval_tree, _expr_to_str, _get_nodes,
_replace_node, _crossover, _mutate, _count_nodes, _compute_fitness,
_permutation_pvalue, _compute_signal_stats, _evolve_population, _discover_walkforward,
discover_indicators_correlation, run_genetic_discovery(pair, intervals),
register_genetic_indicator, run_and_register(pair, live), _fetch_macro.
Imports: .backtest.
Imported by: backtest.py (register_discovered_indicator path), gp_cron.
Note: search space = 15 terminals × 8 window ops × 7 periods × 12 gens × 80 pop.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/gp_intelligence.py  (286 lines)
Purpose: GP entry intelligence — 3-stage (per-indicator WR, allocation matrix,
market fingerprinting). Class GpIntelligence.
Key functions: __init__(state_dir), _load_json, _save, log_entry, record_outcome,
record_traditional_outcome, _update_indicator, indicator_gp_wr, is_locked, record_loss,
record_win, _condition_key, _update_matrix, prefer_gp_over_traditional,
similar_gp_entries, should_suppress_gp, gp_entry_score.
Default: gp_entry_score() returns -0.3 when no data (suppresses GP until ≥5 entries).
Imports: none local (state-only).
Imported by: loop.py.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/chart_vision.py  (276 lines)
Purpose: Generate chart PNG, send to vision LLM, cache context.
Functions: _get_cached_context, _set_cached_context, fetch_ohlcv, generate_chart_png,
_parse_chart_response, analyze_chart_gemini, analyze_chart_groq, get_chart_context,
get_all_chart_contexts.
Models: GEMINI_MODEL="gemini-2.5-flash" (PRIMARY), GROQ_MODEL="meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct" (FALLBACK).
Hard block phrases: "avoid" or "downtrend" → block entry; "sell" + quality<5 → filter.
Cache TTL: 60 min.
Imports: none local.
Imported by: loop.py.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/crisis_learning.py  (266 lines)
Purpose: 9-dim crisis signature vector DB, nearest-neighbor lookup, lived-crisis save.

find_nearest_crisis, get_crisis_recommendation, _compute_crisis_signature_from_history,
_extract_crisis_features, save_lived_crisis, get_safety_status.
CRISIS_SIGNATURE_LENGTH = 9 (matches _ANOMALY_DIM in loop.py).
Pre-seeded crises: COVID-19, Rate Shock 2022, Brexit, SVB (each with signatures + optimal_stop/target).
Imports: none local.
Imported by: loop.py, reflect.py, backtest.py.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/decision_cortex.py  (434 lines)
Purpose: Unified memory across Reflection/GP/Dashboard. Per-type & per-indicator

Functions: _resolve_state, _cdir, _load_json, _save_json, record_entry, record_outcome,

_get_webhook, _notify_exile, _update_indicator_stats, _exile_decay_check, _notify_reinstatement.
Auto-exile: <30% WR as GP entry after 5+ attempts. Exile decay: reconsider after 100 entries.
Imports: none local.
Imported by: loop.py, reflect.py, policy_engine.py, self_audit.py, backtest.py.

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/policy_engine.py  (206 lines)
Purpose: Autonomous policy engine — suppresses entry types, triggers discovery,
accelerates probes, flags rollbacks. Runs every 10 cycles.
Functions: _resolve_state, _load_policy, _save_policy, _add_decision, get_policy,
evaluate(cycle, pairs, current_strategies, cycle_age), set_enabled, is_enabled.
Suppression rule: suppress GP if MR WR≥40% AND GP WR<30%; suppress MR if GP WR≥50%.
Imports: .decision_cortex.
Imported by: loop.py, self_audit.py.

1.2 PYTHON FILES — GOLD BOT (hermes_trading)  [≈ mirror of forex]
─────────────────────────────────────────────
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/loop.py (2492 lines) — Same as forex loop.py with:
  • _check_spread adds vol_max_pct param.
  • log_skip adds `cycle` param.
  • GOLD_PAIRS env default "XAU/USD,XAG/USD".
  • Reads strategy_type from YAML — BUT XAU/XAG YAMLs are mean_reversion (see S4 bug).
  • Imports hermes_trading.* (not hermes_forex.*) EXCEPT backtest.py imports hermes_forex.backtest.
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/reflect.py (2163 lines) — Adds is_contaminated(trade); otherwise mirror.
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/{backtest,genetic_discovery,gp_intelligence,chart_vision,
  crisis_learning,decision_cortex,policy_engine,self_audit}.py — Mirrors forex (same line counts ±).
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/run.py (18 lines) — Entry point.
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/adapters/price.py (93 lines) — yfinance adapter (gold tickers).
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/adapters/macro.py (17 lines) — DEAD: fetches DX-Y.NYB (DXY) + SPY.
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/adapters/news.py (20 lines)  — DEAD: fetches "bitcoin crypto" newsapi.
hermes-gold/hermes_trading/adapters/onchain.py (20 lines) — DEAD: fetches BTC glassnode tx count.
  → All three are crypto-specific, never wired into gold loop.py (imported nowhere).

─────────────────────────────────────────────
1.2b PYTHON FILES — CRYPTO BOT (hermes_crypto)  [3rd full bot, same architecture]
─────────────────────────────────────────────
NOTE: This is a COMPLETE 3rd trading bot, not reference-only. Same 14-engine
architecture as forex/gold. Paper-trading. Pairs: BTC/USD, ETH/USD (24/7 market).

hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/loop.py (2462 lines) — Same 60s loop as forex/gold
  with crypto adaptations: 24/7 no session block; larger stops (BTC 2.5%, ETH 3.0%);
  ATR floor 0.8% (BTC) / 1.0% (ETH) — crypto ATR is 1-5% vs forex 0.05-0.15%.
  Imports hermes_crypto.* internally (self-contained — NO cross-repo import).
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/reflect.py (2133 lines) — 2-layer (L1 rule + L2 3-LLM
  consensus). Key constants verified: GEMINI_MODEL="gemini-2.5-pro",
  GROQ_MODEL="deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b", DEEPSEEK_MODEL="deepseek-chat",
  LLM_MIN_TRADES=10, CIRCUIT_MAX_DD=-5.0%, CIRCUIT_MAX_CONSEC=5,
  MAX_PAUSE_HOURS=48, EVOLVE_DEPLOY_SCORE=60, DEAD_ZONE_CONSEC=5.
  Score gate at line 340: `if s['score'] >= 55:` (same weakened 55, not 65).
  Calls hermes_crypto.decision_cortex (per-pair MR vs GP WR via entry_type_wr).
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/backtest.py (2069 lines) — Mirror of forex backtest
  (7-phase pipeline, Phase 0 OOS first). Self-contained, NO cross-repo import.
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/genetic_discovery.py (850 lines) — GP discovery.
  Params verified: 200 pop, 50 gen, depth<=4, OOS corr>=0.15, top 10% (>=15),
  tree<=60 nodes (line 7, 64, 353, 441-444).
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/gp_intelligence.py (285 lines) — Ensemble governance.
  gp_entry_score() defaults to -0.3 (suppress) — SAME chicken-and-egg issue as forex.
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/{chart_vision,crisis_learning,decision_cortex,
  policy_engine,self_audit}.py — Mirrors forex (smaller: chart_vision 285,
  crisis_learning 266, decision_cortex 433, policy_engine 206, self_audit 433).
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/run.py (18 lines) — Entry point.
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/adapters/price.py (151 lines) — yfinance crypto adapter.
hermes-crypto/hermes_crypto/adapters/{macro,news,onchain}.py (17/20/20 lines) —
  LEGIT here (crypto bot): macro=DXY/SPY, news=crypto newsapi, onchain=BTC glassnode.
  Unlike gold, these are appropriate for a crypto bot but currently imported nowhere.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
1.3 DASHBOARD + CRON FILES
─────────────────────────────────────────────
dashboard/backend/main.py (1790 lines) — FastAPI push-based API. Class ChatBody.
Endpoints (verbatim @app decorators):
  GET  /api/health
  GET  /api/spark?pair=&bars=30
  POST /api/ingest/{bot_name}        (bots push full state every cycle)
  GET  /api/bot/{bot_name}/pulse
  POST /api/bot/{bot_name}/toggle
  GET  /api/overview
  GET  /api/bot/{bot_name}/trades?pair=&limit=
  GET  /api/alerts  / POST /api/alerts/dismiss
  GET  /api/daily-summary / lifetime-summary / range-summary
  GET  /api/skip-analysis/{bot_name}
  GET  /api/strategy-params/{bot_name}
  GET  /api/detailed-report/{bot_name}
  GET  /api/export-text  / /api/export-text/pair/{pair_name}
  GET  /api/auth/status / POST /api/auth/setup / POST /api/auth/login / GET /api/auth/verify
  POST /api/chat
  GET  /api/per-version/{bot_name}
  SQLite tables: trades, hypotheses, skips, latest_state, bot_status.
  Auth: simple password (auth/setup, auth/login, auth/verify).
hermes_gp_cron.py (253 lines) — Weekly GP discovery, Sunday 02:00 UTC. Validates via
  phase0_validate (WR<45% or PnL<0 → reject, 6mo fresh daily),
  crisis_validate (WR<40% in any of 4 crisis windows → reject),
  redundancy_check (Pearson |r|>0.8 vs existing → reject), then walk-forward replace.
  Imports hermes_forex.backtest (CROSS-REPO — breaks in gold-only context).
hermes_heartbeat.py (64 lines) — Checks /api/bot/{forex,gold}/pulse; if no heartbeat in
  90 min → Discord alert. BOTS dict hardcodes railway URLs for forex+gold.

dashboard/frontend/src/App.jsx — React SPA. Tabs: Overview (default), Reports,
  lazy(DiscoveredView), lazy(AuditView), lazy(CortexView). Pair→bot map:
  EUR/USD,GBP/USD,AUD/USD,GBP/JPY→"forex"; XAU/USD,XAG/USD→"gold"; BTC/USD,ETH/USD→"crypto".
  Live refresh via fetch every 60s; pair cards show price/RSI/ADX/BB/PnL/WR/sparkline.
  (Other views: CortexView.jsx, DiscoveredView.jsx, AuditView.jsx, ReportsView.jsx.)

─────────────────────────────────────────────
1.5 JSON/STATE FILES (schema, writer, reader)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
forex/state/goal.yaml — fields: pairs[list], target_return_30d, max_drawdown,
  min_sharpe, failure_below, reflection_every(5), one_variable_only(true),
  gemini_reflection(true), gemini_min_trades(10), hypothesis_tracking(true).
  Writer: loop._seed_default_state / reflect. Reader: loop.load_goal, reflect.
gold/state/goal.yaml — same schema; pairs [XAU/USD,XAG/USD], target_return_30d 0.05,
  max_drawdown 0.08, failure_below -0.04.
forex/state/hypotheses.jsonl — JSONL; one object per reflection hypothesis.
  Writer: decision_cortex.record_hypothesis (via reflect). Reader: reflect.load_hypotheses.
  CURRENT STATE: empty (0 lines) in both repos.
forex/state/trades.jsonl — JSONL; one object per closed trade (asset, entry_price,
  exit_price, pnl_pct, exit_reason, entry_regime, entry_adx, entry_session,
  strategy_type, entry_quality_score, ts). Writer: loop on exit. Reader: loop.load_trades,
  reflect.load_trades, dashboard ingest. CURRENT STATE: empty in both repos
  (live trades live in dashboard SQLite).
state/heartbeat.json — {ts, status, cycle, consecutive_failures, last_price, health,
  regimes, chart_contexts, market_closed}. Writer: loop.write_heartbeat. Reader: none (dashboard uses its own bot_status).
state/flatline_log.jsonl — flatline events. Writer: loop._log_flatline.
state/cortex/indicator_exile.json — exiled indicators. Writer/reader: decision_cortex.
state/discovered/{PAIR}.json — GP discovered indicators [{name,_expr,expr_str,fitness,
  params,total_pnl,win_rate,discovered_at,seed_run}]. Writer: backtest.register_*.
  Reader: backtest.load_discovered_indicators, loop.check_discovered_signals.
state/policy.json — policy engine decisions. Writer: policy_engine. Reader: loop, reflect.
state/skips.json (implied by load/save_skipped) — skip ledger.

NOTE: state/ files are mixed INSIDE the code repo (hermes-forex/state, hermes-gold/state).
This violates "state separated from code" — see Section 4.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

SECTION 2: ENGINE MAP (current system)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

ENGINE 1: Trading Loop Engine (loop.py)
Intelligence Level: 7/7
Purpose: 60s cycle — price fetch, entry/exit decisions, engine orchestration, persistence.
Inputs: yfinance 5m candles (adapters.price), strategy YAML, goal.yaml, state files,
  dashboard pulse (read-back on restart), LLM/chart contexts (cached).
Outputs: trades.jsonl, heartbeat.json, flatline_log.jsonl, skips, dashboard POST /ingest/{bot},
  Discord alerts, reflection subprocess spawn.
Thresholds/magic numbers:
  MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES=5 (circuit_open); CHART_ANALYSIS_INTERVAL=3600s;
  _ECONOMIC_BUFFER=600s (10min event block); _NOVELTY_THRESHOLD_MULT=3.0;
  _FEATURE_WINDOW=500; BB period=20; ATR period=14; ADX period=14; ROC period=20;
  SMA 50/200; EMA 20/50; RSI period=14; price history cap=300 candles;
  re-entry cooldown=30 cycles; flatline novel_regime pause=60 cycles;
  stop-loss warning within 0.5%; ATR dynamic trailing once profit>0.3%;
  breakeven at profit_target*0.5; partial profit at profit_target/2 (half_target);
  session windows NY 13-22 / LDN 08-17 / ASIA 00-08 UTC;
  entry quality scoring: rsi_ratio>=0.4 →+3, >=0.25 →+2, etc (max 10).
Configurable params: goal.yaml, per-pair strategy YAML, ENTRY_THRESHOLD env (RSI pairs only),
  GOLD_PAIRS / FOREX_PAIRS env, DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK, DASHBOARD_API_URL.
Connections: spawns reflect; calls backtest (shadow/discovery), chart_vision, crisis_learning,
  decision_cortex, gp_intelligence, policy_engine; reads price adapter.
Gaps: duplicate of gold loop; cross-repo recovery dependency; ENTRY_THRESHOLD only RSI.

ENGINE 2: Reflection Engine (reflect.py)
Intelligence Level: 6/7
Purpose: Improve params — L1 one-variable rule, L2 3-model LLM consensus, backtest-validated.
Inputs: trades.jsonl, strategy YAML, goal.yaml, chart_context, skipped_json, crisis_data,
  knowledge base, cortex WR.
Outputs: strategy YAML mutation (one var), hypotheses.jsonl, auto-revert, unpause.
Thresholds: STRATEGY_PARAM_RANGES stop_loss(0.5,10), profit_target(0.5,20), etc;
  score gate 55 (was 65); consensus 2/3; auto-revert if cur<prev; unpause after 48h (MAX_PAUSE_HOURS);
  DD>max_dd → tighten stop 0.3; WR<0.3 or (return<-0.5 & ≥8t & ≥10t) → widen stop;
  position size reject >0.5; confidence gate conf>=0.40.
Config: goal.yaml reflection_every=5, one_variable_only, gemini_min_trades=10.
Connections: calls backtest (7-phase), decision_cortex, crisis_learning, policy_engine;
  reads LLM APIs.
Gaps: score gate lowered to 55 weakens protection; forex copy lacks is_contaminated.

ENGINE 3: Backtest & Validation Engine (backtest.py)
Intelligence Level: 4/7
Purpose: 7-phase validation pipeline + symbolic GP discovery + indicator registry.
7 phases (IN ORDER — critical, see S9):
  Phase 0: yfinance out-of-sample validation; Phase 1: historical backtest;
  Phase 1.5: crisis stress test; Phase 2: permutation/walk-forward;
  Phase 3: alpha decomposition (luck vs skill); Phase 4: regime breakdown;
  Phase 5: confidence + correlation-risk scoring; Phase 6: deploy/register.
Inputs: pair, param, old_val, new_val, strategy, candle_dir; yfinance history.
Outputs: backtest report, verdict (accept/reject), discovered indicator registration.
Thresholds: OOS correlation >=0.15 target; redundancy |r|>0.8; exile <30% WR / 5 attempts;
  degradation cull <40% WR indicators.
Config: candle_dir path, population/generations (cron: pop 80, gens 12, top_k 2).
Gaps: built in wrong order historically (OOS last, now Phase 0 first); cross-repo import.

ENGINE 4: Genetic Programming Engine (genetic_discovery.py)
Intelligence Level: 6/7
Purpose: Evolve novel mathematical indicators via GP; walk-forward + permutation p-value.
Inputs: price + macro multi-dim data (15 terminals), pair, intervals.
Outputs: indicator expressions ranked by forward-return correlation.
Thresholds: fitness = Pearson corr(signal, forward-horizon return); permutation p-value;
  top_k, population, generations; horizon N.
Gaps: dual data contract (list vs dict) vs backtest._eval_expr.

ENGINE 5: GP Intelligence Layer (gp_intelligence.py)
Intelligence Level: 5/7
Purpose: 3-stage GP entry governance — per-indicator WR, allocation matrix, fingerprinting.
Inputs: pair, regime, adx, vol_pct, session, rsi; live outcomes.
Outputs: gp_entry_score [-1,+1]; suppress/reinforce; lockout on consecutive losses.
Thresholds: gp_entry_score default -0.3 (suppress until ≥5 entries); lockout after 3 consec losses;
  fingerprint buckets (regime+adx_bucket+vol_bucket+session); <3 entries → None WR; <40% WR → suppress.
Gaps: depends on enough cortex data; score -0.3 default can over-suppress.

ENGINE 6: Chart Vision Engine (chart_vision.py)
Intelligence Level: 2/7
Purpose: Chart PNG → vision LLM → text context; hard block on avoid/downtrend.
Inputs: yfinance OHLCV (1h, 100 candles), PNG.
Outputs: context string (cached 60min) consumed by loop entry gates.
Models: Gemini gemini-2.5-flash (PRIMARY), Groq llama-4-scout (FALLBACK).
Thresholds: hard block if "avoid"/"downtrend"; soft if "sell" & quality<5; cache 60min.
Gaps: only L2; depends on vision API availability.

ENGINE 7: Crisis Learning Engine (crisis_learning.py)
Intelligence Level: 4/7
Purpose: 9-dim crisis signature DB; nearest-neighbor; recommend stop/target; save lived crises.
Inputs: 9-float feature vector (_extract_crisis_features), price/volume history.
Outputs: recommended_stop_pct, recommended_target_pct, crisis_name, distance; lived crisis save.
Thresholds: CRISIS_SIGNATURE_LENGTH=9; cosine distance; flatline if distance<0.5 on novel regime.
Pre-seeded: COVID-19, Rate Shock 2022, Brexit, SVB.
Gaps: signatures hand-seeded, not auto-learned beyond save_lived_crisis.

ENGINE 8: Decision Cortex (decision_cortex.py)
Intelligence Level: 5/7
Purpose: Unified memory; per-type & per-indicator WR; exile; condition routing.
Inputs: trade open/close, hypotheses, discoveries, indicators.
Outputs: entry_type_wr, best_entry_type, exile list, cortex summary.
Thresholds: auto-exile <30% WR after 5+ GP attempts; exile decay reconsider every 100 entries;
  reinstate if WR≥40%.
Gaps: none major; central to routing.

ENGINE 9: Policy Engine (policy_engine.py)
Intelligence Level: (registry: part of L9 autonomous) 
Purpose: Suppress entry types, trigger discovery, accelerate probes, flag rollbacks.
Inputs: cycle, pairs, strategies, cortex WR.
Outputs: policy.json, suppressions consumed by loop GP gate.
Thresholds: suppress GP if MR WR≥40% & GP WR<30%; suppress MR if GP WR≥50%;
  priority discovery if ≥2 indicators exiled fleet-wide; probe interval 10 if cortex<5;
  rollback flag if MR WR<30% & ≥10 trades; decision log cap 20.
Gaps: reads cortex which may be empty early.

ENGINE 10: Self Audit Engine (self_audit.py)
Intelligence Level: (registry 3.3/5 subsystem)
Purpose: Daily audit of reflection, GP, degradation, discovery, dashboard, persistence, cortex, policy.
Inputs: all state files + dashboard API.
Outputs: audit report (critical/warn/info).
Thresholds: per-check heuristics (e.g., GP entries need ≥5; exile health).
Gaps: persistence audit trusts _recover_trades_from_dashboard.

ENGINE 11: Price Adapter (adapters/price.py)
Intelligence Level: 1/7
Purpose: Fetch live 5m candle from yfinance; history seeding.
Inputs: pair ticker.
Outputs: {price, high, low, candle_ts, ts}.
Thresholds: none numeric (relies on yfinance).
Gaps: no internal 300-candle seed guarantee; stale-candle guard lives in loop, not adapter.

ENGINE 12: Dashboard API (dashboard/backend/main.py)
Intelligence Level: 5/7
Purpose: Persist bot pushes (SQLite), serve 20+ endpoints, auth, chat.
Inputs: POST /ingest/{bot} every cycle.
Outputs: overview, trades, summaries, alerts, sparkline, per-version, cortex/discovered (via bot state).
Thresholds: trade history cap 300 (overview) / 5000 (bot trades); alert lookback by day.
Gaps: bot identifier must match loop HERMES_BOT_NAME exactly (forex/gold) — mismatch causes
  stale-trade contamination between bots (see S4).

ENGINE 13: Dashboard Frontend (App.jsx)
Intelligence Level: 3/7
Purpose: Render pair cards, cortex/discovered/audit tabs, reports, auth.
Inputs: GET /api/* every 60s.
Outputs: UI; bot toggle POST.
Gaps: pair→bot map hardcoded; crypto pairs shown though not in forex/gold scope.

ENGINE 14: GP Cron Job (hermes_gp_cron.py)
Intelligence Level: (validates GP, feeds Engine 4/5)
Purpose: Weekly discovery + 3-gate validation + walk-forward replace.
Schedule: Sunday 02:00 UTC.
Thresholds: phase0 WR≥45% & PnL>0 (6mo); crisis WR≥40% (4 windows); redundancy |r|≤0.8;
  replace if best beats by >10% WR & better PnL; pop 80, gens 12, top_k 2.
Gaps: imports hermes_forex.backtest (cross-repo).

ENGINE 15: Heartbeat Monitor (hermes_heartbeat.py)
Intelligence Level: (monitoring)
Purpose: Alert if a bot missed heartbeat >90min or desired_state≠running.
Schedule: external cron (every N min).
Thresholds: 90 minutes; BOTS hardcoded forex+gold railway URLs.
Gaps: DISCORD_WEBHOOK=None by default → only local print.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

SECTION 3: COMPLETE INTELLIGENCE LAYER MAP
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
The "60 layers" = the enumerated guards below (every one is real, with exact values
and source line references). Grouped by engine. "Prod-tested" = appears in CHANGELOG
as deployed/fixed (YES) or only coded (PARTIAL/NO).

LOOP.PY GUARDS (entry/exit/safety)
L01 Stale-candle guard — skip if candle_ts == last (line 1873). Trigger: duplicate Friday candle. Action: skip append. Prod: YES (fix #fake-trades).
L02 Flat-price guard — skip if rsi<0.01 & roc==0 & adx in (None,0) (line 1910). Action: skip. Prod: YES.
L03 BB bandwidth guard — skip if bb_bw<0.001 (line 1924). Action: skip (no MR edge). Prod: YES.
L04 Session filter (MR) — ny_only/london_only/asian_only mismatch → skip (lines 1929-1937). Action: skip. Prod: YES.
L05 GBP correlation — GBP/USD↔GBP/JPY both-open → skip (lines 1939-1944). Prod: YES.
L06 XAU/XAG correlation — both-open → skip (lines 1946-1950). Prod: YES.
L07 USD volatility flag — EUR/USD stop within 1h → tighten/skip other USD pairs (lines 1953-1958). Prod: PARTIAL.
L08 MR entry condition — price<=bb_lower AND rsi<mr_entry_rsi (line 1960). Action: candidate. Prod: YES.
L09 ADX trend filter (MR) — adx<threshold → skip, 50-cycle bypass cap (lines 1962-1974). Prod: YES.
L10 BEAR regime skip (MR) — regime==BEAR & not allow_bear_entries → skip (lines 1980-1984). Prod: YES.
L11 Economic calendar guard — within 10min of high-impact event → skip (lines 1986-1991, _ECONOMIC_BUFFER=600). Prod: YES.
L12 Entry quality floor — mr_quality<min_quality → skip (lines 2008-2011). Prod: YES.
L13 Discovered-ensemble bearish block — consensus in (bearish,strong_bearish) → skip long (lines 2018-2021). Prod: YES (v06→v07 fix).
L14 Chart hard block — "avoid"/"downtrend" in context → skip (lines 2028-2031). Prod: YES.
L15 Re-entry cooldown — stopped out <30 cycles → skip (lines 2033-2037). Prod: YES.
L16 Chart soft filter — "sell" & quality<5 → skip (lines 2038-2042). Prod: YES.
L17 RSI momentum entry — rsi<threshold & quality & confluence (lines 2140+, parallel path). Prod: YES.
L18 Multi-pair confluence — <2 pairs oversold → skip RSI entry (check_correlation, line 2349-2352). Prod: YES.
L19 Spread guard — spread_proxy>stop/3 → skip (lines 1109-1112, 2476-2482). Prod: YES.
L20 Daily RSI bonus — daily RSI confluence [-1,0,+1] (line 564/_get_daily_rsi_bonus). Prod: PARTIAL.
L21 Novel-regime flatline — novelty score>3.0*median → pause 60 cycles (lines 1047,1813-1817). Prod: YES.
L22 Consecutive-loss flatline — N consec losses → flatline (lines 1692-1703, _update_consecutive_losses). Prod: YES.
L23 Stop-loss cooldown — stop_loss exit → block re-entry 30 cycles (lines 1688-1690). Prod: YES.
L24 Circuit breaker — consecutive_failures>=5 → sleep 300s (lines 1480-1482, MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES=5). Prod: YES.
L25 ATR dynamic trailing — profit>0.3% → trail ATR distance (lines 1572-1574). Prod: YES.
L26 Breakeven — unrealised>=profit_target*0.5 → move stop to breakeven (line 1583). Prod: YES.
L27 Partial profit — unrealised_pct >= profit_target_pct (FULL target, e.g. 3.0%; NOT
    target/2 — corrected in v4, source confirmed at Appendix A ~line 3374-3379)
    → close 50%, stop moved to breakeven. Prod: YES.
    [v4 correction: earlier drafts wrote this as "hold_cycles>100 & profit_target/2,"
    which conflates it with the separate L26 breakeven trigger (which IS at
    profit_target*0.5, line 3362). These are two different guards at two different
    thresholds — L26 fires at half target, L27 fires at full target. hold_cycles>100
    is unrelated to either trigger; it only gates a display string, not the logic.]
L28 Stop-warning alert — within 0.5% of stop → Discord (lines 1753-1758). Prod: YES.
L29 GP ensemble entry — consensus strong_bullish & n>=2 & rsi<65 & weight>=0.5 & adx>=20 & gp_bad<3 & gp_score>=0 (lines 2238-2243). Prod: YES.
L30 GP probe entry — cortex empty & cycle%probe_int(50)==0 & bullish & n>=2 → 25% size (lines 2287-2315). Prod: YES.
L31 GP degradation lockout — 3 consec GP losses → block GP (lines 1719-1721). Prod: YES.
L32 Portfolio correlation sizing — ≥2 other pairs bullish → size -(15%*n) (lines 2338-2341). Prod: YES.
L33 GP ensemble sizing — <10 trades → 50% size; probe→25%; NEUTRAL→-40% (lines 2359-2376). Prod: YES.
L34 MR-vs-GP cortex suppression — best_entry_type MR & gp_score>-0.3 → force -0.3 (lines 2232-2233). Prod: YES.
L35 Policy GP suppression — policy suppressions[pair][gp_ensemble] → skip (lines 2257-2259). Prod: YES.
L36 Exile filter — exiled indicators removed from GP candidacy (lines 2246-2252). Prod: YES.
L37 Reflection latch — once per reflection_every (5) trades, pair-specific (lines 2556-2568). Prod: YES.
L38 GP intelligence fingerprint — gp_entry_score from similar past conditions (lines 2224-2225). Prod: YES.
L39 Stale-candle dedup on close — prevent flat prices breaking indicators. Prod: YES.

REFLECT.PY GUARDS
L40 Param range hard gate — STRATEGY_PARAM_RANGES (stop 0.5-10, target 0.5-20...) (lines 188-218). Prod: YES.
L41 Score gate — score>=55 to allow L2 (line 340, was 65). Prod: YES (weakened).
L42 One-variable-only — one_variable_only=true enforces single change (goal.yaml). Prod: YES.
L43 Auto-revert — current version underperforms previous → revert (line 411+). Prod: YES.
L44 Drawdown stop-tighten — DD>max_dd → stop -0.3 (lines 411-415). Prod: YES.
L45 Win-rate widen — WR<0.3 or (return<-0.5 & ≥8t & ≥10t) → widen stop (line 420). Prod: YES.
L46 Position-size reject — new_size>0.5 → reject (line 1108). Prod: YES.
L47 Historical hypothesis check — reject repeat of failed param change (check_historical_hypotheses). Prod: YES.
L48 Knowledge-base verdict — check_knowledge_base_for_change gates deploy. Prod: YES.
L49 LLM consensus 2/3 — call_gemini/groq/deepseek + majority (call_llm_consensus). Prod: YES.
L50 Confidence gate — conf>=0.40 to apply (line 1212). Prod: YES.
L51 Contamination strip — is_contaminated removes bugged trades (gold only). Prod: GOLD ONLY.
L52 Self-heal unpause — maybe_auto_unpause every cycle, MAX_PAUSE_HOURS=48 (lines 57, ~). Prod: YES.

BACKTEST.PY GUARDS
L53 Phase 0 OOS validation — reject if OOS corr<0.15 (backtest_with_history). Prod: YES.
L54 Crisis stress — crisis_backtest across 4 windows. Prod: YES.
L55 Permutation p-value — _permutation_pvalue significance. Prod: PARTIAL.
L56 Alpha decomposition — separate luck vs skill. Prod: YES.
L57 Redundancy |r|>0.8 reject — register path. Prod: YES.
L58 Exile <30% WR — _check_exile. Prod: YES.
L59 Degradation cull <40% WR — gp_intelligence/gp cron. Prod: YES.
L60 Shadow-only until promoted — evaluate_shadow_signals NEVER affects entries (line 1886-1888). Prod: YES.

CRON/OTHER
L61 GP cron phase0 WR≥45%/PnL>0; L62 crisis WR≥40%; L63 redundancy |r|>0.8; L64 walk-forward replace >10% WR. (hermes_gp_cron.py)
L65 Heartbeat 90-min silence alert (hermes_heartbeat.py).
L66 Self-audit daily 8am UTC (CHANGELOG 0371514).

Total enumerated concrete guards ≈ 66 (satisfies "60 layers").

── Decision flow for a SINGLE TRADE ENTRY (mean-reversion pair) ─
1. loop fetches price (L01 stale-candle guard).
2. Append to 300-cap history; compute RSI/ROC/ADX/BB (L02 flat-price guard, L03 BB-bw guard).
3. Read strategy_type=mean_reversion; session_filter → L04 session guard.
4. L05/L06 correlation guard (GBP or XAU/XAG both-open).
5. L07 USD-vol flag if EUR/USD stopped recently.
6. L08 MR condition: price<=bb_lower AND rsi<mr_entry_rsi.
7. L09 ADX trend filter (+50-cycle bypass cap).
8. L10 BEAR regime skip (allow_bear_entries=false).
9. L11 economic calendar 10-min block.
10. L12 entry-quality floor.
11. L13 discovered-ensemble bearish block (skip long if bearish).
12. L14 chart hard block (avoid/downtrend); L16 chart soft (sell & quality<5).
13. L15 re-entry cooldown (30 cycles after stop).
14. L18 (RSI path only) multi-pair confluence; L19 spread guard.
15. Best candidate selected (lowest RSI among MR).
16. GP gate attempted if no traditional signal (L29-L36) — skipped for MR.
17. Position size computed (L33 sizing rules; L32 portfolio correlation).
18. ATR stop from atr_multiplier (or atr_floor floor); entry logged to cortex (record_entry).
19. Discord alert + dashboard push + heartbeat.

── Decision flow for a REFLECTION CYCLE ─
1. loop detects pair_total_closed % reflection_every(5)==0 AND not latched (L37).
2. Spawn reflect.combined_reflect subprocess with trades/chart/crisis context.
3. run_safety_checks (L40 param-range gate, L43 auto-revert check).
4. score_trades; if score>=55 (L41, weakened) proceed.
5. layer1_rule_based: one-variable proposal (L42 one-var-only).
6. validate_proposal via backtest 7-phase (L53 OOS, L54 crisis, L55 perm, L56 alpha, L57 redundancy, L59 degradation, L58 exile).
7. check_historical_hypotheses / knowledge base (L47/L48) — reject repeats.
8. If L1 uncertain → layer2_gemini + call_llm_consensus 3-model (L49) → 2/3 vote.
9. Confidence gate (L50); apply if conf>=0.40.
10. maybe_auto_unpause (L52) runs every cycle regardless.
11. Save YAML + hypotheses.jsonl; notify Discord; cortex.record_hypothesis.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

SECTION 4: STRUCTURAL PROBLEMS IN CURRENT SYSTEM
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

P1. Code duplication between hermes-forex and hermes-gold
  Root cause: copy-paste of loop.py/reflect.py/backtest.py/etc.; gold = forex + tweaks.
  Symptoms: two 2600-line loop.py files 95% identical; bug fixes applied to one not the other.
  Files: all hermes_forex/* vs hermes_trading/*.
  Impact: double maintenance; drift causes divergent behavior on same pair logic.
  Fix: single shared engine package; bots are config instances (Section 6).

P2. State files mixed with code files
  Root cause: state/ committed inside each repo (hermes-forex/state, hermes-gold/state).
  Symptoms: redeploys can wipe state; "state resolves /app/state → D:/projects/.../state"
    (summary line 81) shows fragile path resolution; volume not isolated.
  Files: state/ across both repos.
  Impact: trades/hypotheses/discovered lost on container rebuild; restart recovery
    depends on dashboard being up.
  Fix: state on a separate persistent volume, mounted at /data; code read-only.

P3. Gold bot strategy type mismatch (MR vs trending instrument)
  Root cause: XAU/XAG YAMLs set strategy_type: mean_reversion (v01) from day 1, but
    gold/silver are trending instruments — MR long-only loses in trends.
  Symptoms: gold runs MR long-only with allow_bear_entries=false; v01 comment says
    "same architecture as forex MR pairs". AUD/USD correctly uses rsi_momentum.
  Files: XAU_USD.yaml, XAG_USD.yaml, hermes_trading/loop.py (reads strategy_type generically).
  Impact: gold strategy fundamentally wrong instrument fit; suboptimal/negative in trends.
  Fix: gold/silver MUST use rsi_momentum (or trend) strategy in rebuild (Section 8).

P4. Dead adapters in gold bot
  Root cause: macro.py/news.py/onchain.py are crypto-specific (DX-Y.NYB/SPY,
    "bitcoin crypto" newsapi, BTC glassnode) — copy-pasted from crypto bot, never wired in.
  Symptoms: adapters import nowhere in gold loop; news.py/onchain.py query crypto sources.
  Files: hermes_trading/adapters/{macro,news,onchain}.py (all 3 flagged "DEAD").
  Impact: dead code, confusion, potential accidental crypto signals on gold.
  Fix: remove entirely; if macro needed for gold use proper gold-correlated macro (DXY, real yields).

P5. Dashboard data routing (bot identifier inconsistency)
  Root cause: dashboard keys trades by bot_name; loop uses HERMES_BOT_NAME
    (forex/gold) but App.jsx pair→bot map and heartbeat BOTS dict must match exactly.
  Symptoms: risk of stale trade contamination between bots if identifier mismatched
    (e.g., both push as same bot). ingest endpoint trusts bot_name from URL path.
  Files: dashboard/backend/main.py ingest (line 292), App.jsx (lines 64-73), heartbeat BOTS.
  Impact: one bot's trades could appear under another; wrong PnL/WR on dashboard.
  Fix: enforce single source of bot identity (config), validate on ingest.

P6. Statistical insufficiency (trade counts per pair)
  Root cause: reflection_every=5 but pairs have <10-30 closed trades; AUD/USD 19 trades,
    others far fewer; GP needs ≥10 trades for full size, cortex needs ≥3-5.
  Symptoms: hypotheses.jsonl empty (0 lines); trades.jsonl empty locally (live only in dashboard).
  Files: goal.yaml reflection_every=5; loop sizing rules (line 2358 <10 → 50%).
  Impact: reflection fires on insufficient sample → overfit/v06→v07-style cliffs.
  Fix: raise effective sample requirements; gate reflection on ≥N statistically-valid trades.

P7. Incomplete integration of late-added engines
  Root cause: crisis_learning, gp_intelligence, policy_engine, decision_cortex, self_audit,
    chart_vision added after core loop; integration is partial/ad-hoc (try/except pass blocks).
  Symptoms: many `try: ... except Exception: pass` around engine calls in loop.py (lines 1682-1712,
    1884-1888, 2014-2023) — failures silently swallowed; GP intelligence default -0.3 over-suppresses.
  Files: loop.py (all engine call sites wrapped in bare excepts).
  Impact: engine failures invisible; "silently blind" bot.
  Fix: explicit error propagation + health flags; engines are first-class, not optional.

P8. Cross-repo imports (hermes-gold → hermes_forex)
  Root cause: hermes-gold/.../backtest.py imports `hermes_forex.backtest` (line confirmed);
    hermes_gp_cron.py imports hermes_forex.backtest.
  Symptoms: gold bot can't run without forex package installed; cron only validates forex pairs.
  Files: hermes-gold/hermes_trading/backtest.py (import list), hermes_gp_cron.py.
  Impact: violates single-codebase goal; deployment coupling.
  Fix: shared engine package imported by both; cron parameterized by config.

P9. 198 "fake trades" / weekend pollution bug (root cause documented)
  Root cause: yfinance returns same Friday candle all weekend; loop appended duplicates
    → RSI/ATR/ADX/BB collapse to zero → spurious entries. CHANGELOG: "71 fake EUR/USD trades"
    (weekend). Aggregate across pairs ≈ 198 fake trades historically.
  Symptoms: trades.jsonl polluted with zero-indicator entries on weekends.
  Files: loop.py (fixed by L01 stale-candle guard line 1873 + L02 flat-price guard line 1910).
  Impact: corrupted trade stats → bad reflection.
  Fix: stale-candle guard is the canonical fix; must be in price adapter, not loop only.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

SECTION 5: PRESERVED FEATURES LIST (the contract)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
□ ENTRY SIGNAL TYPES
  □ Mean Reversion (MR): price <= BB_lower(20, std) AND RSI < mr_entry_rsi (per pair).
  □ RSI Momentum: RSI < entry.threshold (per pair) + confluence + quality.
  □ GP Ensemble: discovered-indicator consensus == strong_bullish, n>=2, rsi<65, weight>=0.5, adx>=20, gp_bad<3, gp_score>=0.
  □ GP Probe: cortex empty, cycle%probe_int(50)==0, bullish, n>=2, 25% size.
□ EXITS
  □ Stop loss: ATR-based (atr_multiplier × ATR) OR fixed stop_loss_pct, with atr_floor_pct minimum.
  □ Profit target: profit_target_pct.
  □ Trailing stop: trailing_stop_pct; ATR dynamic once profit>0.3%.
  □ Time exit: time_exit_cycles (360 forex / 720 gold).
  □ Partial profit: at unrealised_pct >= profit_target_pct (FULL target), close 50%,
    stop to breakeven. (v4: corrected — not hold_cycles>100/half-target as previously
    stated; that description conflated this guard with the separate L26 breakeven rule.)
  □ Breakeven: move stop to entry at unrealised >= profit_target*0.5.
□ FILTERS / THRESHOLDS (exact)
  □ Session filters: london_only(08-17), ny_only(13-22), asian_only(00-08), 24h.
  □ ADX threshold per pair (15/25/15/20/10/10); <threshold → skip (50-cycle bypass cap).
  □ Volatility band: vol_threshold_pct / vol_max_pct / vol_min_pct per pair.
  □ Entry quality floor: minimum_entry_quality (0 currently).
  □ Re-entry cooldown: 30 cycles post stop-loss.
  □ Economic calendar block: 10 min (600s) around high-impact events.
  □ Spread guard: spread_proxy > stop/3 → skip.
  □ Multi-pair confluence: ≥2 forex pairs oversold for RSI entry.
  □ Correlation skip: GBP/USD↔GBP/JPY; XAU/USD↔XAG/USD both-open.
  □ Chart hard block: "avoid"/"downtrend"; soft: "sell" & quality<5.
  □ Novel-regime flatline: pause 60 cycles.
  □ Consecutive-loss flatline.
  □ Circuit breaker: 5 consecutive failures → 300s sleep.
  □ USD vol flag: EUR/USD stop within 1h tightens other USD pairs.
□ INTELLIGENCE LAYERS — all 66 guards in Section 3 (L01–L66) MUST survive.
□ YAML PARAMS + valid ranges (STRATEGY_PARAM_RANGES):
  stop_loss_pct (0.5–10.0), profit_target_pct (0.5–20.0), trailing_stop_pct, time_exit_cycles,
  position_size_r, atr_multiplier, adx_threshold, vol_threshold_pct, vol_max_pct, vol_min_pct,
  bb_std_dev, mr_entry_rsi, threshold (RSI), atr_floor_pct, use_atr_floor, allow_bear_entries,
  minimum_entry_quality, session_filter.
□ LLM MODELS + ROLES
  □ Gemini gemini-2.5-pro — L2 reflection primary analyst + chart vision primary (gemini-2.5-flash).
  □ Groq deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b — L2 reflection consensus node + chart vision fallback (llama-4-scout).
  □ DeepSeek deepseek-chat — L2 reflection consensus node (marginal backtest resolver).
  □ Consensus: 3-model, 2/3 voting.
□ DISCORD ALERT TYPES
  □ Trade entry/exit, STOP WARNING (within 0.5%), FLATLINE (novel/consecutive), CHART BLOCK,
    GP-ENTRY, GP-DEGRADE, EXILE/REINSTATEMENT, reflection output, heartbeat silence (heartbeat.py).
□ DASHBOARD VIEWS + data source
  □ Overview (latest_state + trades + hypotheses + skips) — /api/overview.
  □ Cortex (per-type WR, exiles) — cortex summary via bot state.
  □ Discovered (GP indicators) — discovered/{pair}.json via bot state.
  □ Audit (self_audit run) — audit endpoint.
  □ Reports — /api/detailed-report, /api/export-text.
  □ Alerts — /api/alerts. Sparkline — /api/spark. Auth — /api/auth/*.
□ CRON JOBS
  □ hermes_gp_cron.py — Sunday 02:00 UTC (GP discovery + 3-gate validation + walk-forward).
  □ hermes_heartbeat.py — every N min (90-min silence alert).
  □ self_audit — daily 08:00 UTC.
  □ Reflection — every 5 closed trades (in-loop latch).
□ STATE FILES + schema — listed Section 1.5 (goal.yaml, hypotheses.jsonl, trades.jsonl,
  heartbeat.json, flatline_log.jsonl, cortex/indicator_exile.json, discovered/{pair}.json,
  policy.json, skips.json).
□ SESSION FILTERS PER PAIR
  EUR/USD london_only | GBP/USD 24h | GBP/JPY ny_only | AUD/USD asian_only |
  XAU/USD 24h | XAG/USD 24h.
□ STRATEGY PER PAIR (current, CORRECTED in S8)
  EUR/USD MR | GBP/USD MR | GBP/JPY MR | AUD/USD RSI-momentum |
  XAU/USD → momentum (NOT MR) | XAG/USD → momentum (NOT MR).

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

SECTION 6: NEW ARCHITECTURE DESIGN
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

Constraints: single shared codebase; bots = config instances; state on separate volume;
each engine standalone + unit-testable; gold/silver = momentum not MR.

FOLDER STRUCTURE (new monorepo `hermes-trading/`):
  hermes-trading/
    hermes_core/                # shared engine package (NO duplication)
      __init__.py
      config/                   # config schema + loader + validator
        schema.py  loader.py  validator.py
      adapters/
        price.py                # yfinance 5m + 300-candle seed + stale-candle guard
      indicators/               # RSI, ATR, ADX, BB, ROC, SMA, EMA, regime
        __init__.py
      engines/
        entry.py                # MR + RSI-momentum + GP-ensemble paths
        exit.py                 # SL/TP/trailing/time/partial/breakeven
        risk.py                 # position sizing + RR guard
        loop.py                 # 60s orchestrator (generic, config-driven)
        reflect.py              # L1+L2 reflection
        backtest.py             # 7-phase pipeline + GP discovery + registry
        genetic.py              # symbolic GP
        gp_intelligence.py
        chart_vision.py
        crisis_learning.py
        decision_cortex.py
        policy_engine.py
        self_audit.py
      state/                    # state INTERFACE (reads/writes /data)
        store.py                # abstract persistence (SQLite/JSON on volume)
      models.py                 # dataclasses: Trade, Strategy, Goal, Indicator
    bots/
      forex/config.yaml         # pairs EUR/USD,GBP/USD,GBP/JPY,AUD/USD + per-pair
      gold/config.yaml          # pairs XAU/USD,XAG/USD (momentum) + per-pair
      crypto/config.yaml        # (reference, out of primary scope)
    dashboard/
      backend/  frontend/       # unchanged structure, bot identity from config
    cron/
      gp_cron.py                # config-driven (no cross-repo import)
      heartbeat.py
    tests/                      # one test file per engine
    data/                       # PERSISTENT VOLUME mount (state separated from code)
      forex/  gold/
    pyproject.toml  Dockerfile  railway.json

CONFIG SCHEMA (per-bot config.yaml):
  bot:
    name: forex|gold
    pairs: [EUR/USD, ...]
  goal: {target_return_30d, max_drawdown, min_sharpe, failure_below,
         reflection_every, one_variable_only, gemini_reflection, gemini_min_trades}
  global: {dashboard_url, discord_webhook, llm_keys, fmp_key}
  pairs:
    EUR/USD:
      strategy_type: mean_reversion | rsi_momentum   # gold MUST be rsi_momentum
      entry: {indicator, direction, mr_entry_rsi|threshold, bb_std_dev, session_filter}
      stop_loss_pct, profit_target_pct, trailing_stop_pct, time_exit_cycles,
      position_size_r, atr_multiplier, atr_floor_pct, use_atr_floor,
      adx_threshold, vol_threshold_pct, vol_max_pct, vol_min_pct,
      minimum_entry_quality, allow_bear_entries
  (validator enforces STRATEGY_PARAM_RANGES + strategy_type∈{mr,momentum} + session∈{...})

ENGINE INTERFACE CONTRACTS (what each accepts/returns):
  PriceAdapter.fetch(pair) -> Candle{price,high,low,ts}; .seed_history(pair)->300 candles.
  IndicatorEngine.compute_all(prices) -> {rsi,atr,adx,bb,roc,regime,fast_regime,divergence}.
  EntryEngine.evaluate(pair, indicators, strategy, context) -> Optional[Signal{type,quality,size}].
  ExitEngine.evaluate(trade, indicators) -> Optional[Exit{reason,price}].
  RiskEngine.size(strategy, regime, vol, gp_state) -> float (0..0.5).
  ReflectEngine.reflect(pair, trades, goal, context) -> Proposal{param,old,new,conf}.
  BacktestEngine.validate(param,old,new,pair) -> Verdict{phase_results,accept}.
  GeneticEngine.discover(pair) -> List[Indicator].
  GPIntelligence.score(pair,cond) -> float[-1,1]; .should_suppress()->(bool,reason).
  ChartVision.context(pair) -> str (cache 60m); hard_block()->bool.
  CrisisLearning.recommend(features) -> {stop,target,crisis,distance}.
  Cortex.record_entry/outcome/hypothesis/discovery; .best_entry_type()->str.
  PolicyEngine.evaluate(cycle,pairs,strategies) -> Policy{suppressions,...}.
  SelfAudit.run() -> Report.

DATA FLOW DIAGRAM:
  PriceAdapter → IndicatorEngine → EntryEngine ⇄ (GPIntelligence, ChartVision,
    CrisisLearning, Cortex, PolicyEngine) → RiskEngine → ExitEngine
  Entry/Exit → Cortex.record_* ; → State store (/data) ; → Dashboard POST /ingest/{bot}
  Loop every 5 trades → ReflectEngine → BacktestEngine(7-phase) → Strategy YAML
  Cron Sunday → GeneticEngine → BacktestEngine → GPIntelligence registry
  Heartbeat → State + Dashboard pulse; Heartbeat monitor alerts on 90min silence

STATE FILE SCHEMA (on /data volume):
  /data/{bot}/goal.yaml, trades.jsonl, hypotheses.jsonl, heartbeat.json,
  flatline_log.jsonl, policy.json, skips.json, cortex/indicator_exile.json,
  discovered/{pair}.json  — identical schema to Section 1.5, but on persistent volume.

ENV VARS REQUIRED:
  HERMES_BOT_NAME, FOREX_PAIRS/GOLD_PAIRS (or via config), DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK,
  DASHBOARD_API_URL, GEMINI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY,
  FINANCIALMODELINGPREP_API_KEY, YFINANCE present, DATA_VOLUME=/data.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

SECTION 7: REBUILD PLAN — COMPONENT ORDER (18 phases, expanded with concrete test cases)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
[Source-grounded build targets reference Appendix A verbatim files:
 hermes-forex/hermes_forex/{loop,reflect,backtest,genetic_discovery,gp_intelligence,
 chart_vision,crisis_learning,decision_cortex,policy_engine,self_audit}.py and
 adapters/price.py. Indicator functions verified: compute_rsi(prices, period=14) at
 loop.py:1792; compute_atr(prices, period=14) at loop.py:1813; compute_roc(prices,20)
 at loop.py:1803; compute_avg_volume(volumes,20) at loop.py:1826; _get_session(hour) at
 loop.py:1778 (LDN 8<=h<17, NY 13<=h<21, ASIA 0<=h<8, else OTHER); write_heartbeat(asset,
 cycle, consecutive_failures, last_price) at loop.py:1774 writes keys ts, asset, cycle,
 consecutive_failures, last_price, status. Stale-candle guard: _last_candle_ts dict at
 loop.py:1612. GP entry gate numeric values from loop.py: gp bullish+n>=2+rsi<65+
 weight>=0.5+adx>=20+gp_bad_losses<3+gp_entry_score>=0. OOS gate oos_delta>-0.2 from
 backtest.py. gp_entry_score default -0.3 (gp_intelligence.py:253). Re-entry cooldown /
 ATR-stop / RR-guard specifics marked [NOT FOUND IN SOURCE] where not present in Appendix A.]

PHASE 1: Project scaffold + config system
  Build target:
    Files: hermes_forex/__init__.py, hermes_forex/config.py, hermes_forex/state/strategies/{EUR_USD,GBP_USD,GBP_JPY,AUD_USD}.yaml
    Functions:
      load_config(bot: str) -> dict
      load_strategy_for_pair(pair: str) -> dict
      validate_strategy_params(strategy: dict) -> None  # raises ValueError on bad range
      _seed_default_state() -> None
  Dependencies: none. Reference Appendix A: config loaders at loop.py:1700-1741.
  Success criteria (pass/fail gates):
    def test_load_valid_forex_config():
        cfg = load_config("forex")
        assert cfg["pairs"] == ["EUR/USD", "GBP/USD", "GBP/JPY", "AUD/USD"]
    def test_load_stop_loss_below_min():
        with pytest.raises(ValidationError):
            validate_strategy_params({"stop_loss_pct": 0.3})   # 0.3 < 0.5 minimum
    def test_load_unknown_session_filter():
        with pytest.raises(ValidationError):
            validate_strategy_params({"entry": {"session_filter": "tokyo_only"}})
    def test_load_gold_config_momentum():
        gold = load_strategy_for_pair("XAU/USD")
        assert gold["strategy_type"] == "rsi_momentum"   # not "mean_reversion"
  How to run: pytest tests/test_config.py -k "forex or stop_loss or session or gold"
  Failure definition: any test raises unexpected exception, or XAU/USD strategy_type !=
    "rsi_momentum", or pairs != exact 4-element list -> PHASE 1 FAILED, fix before Phase 2.
  Estimated LLM sessions: 0 (pure deterministic config code).

PHASE 2: Price adapter
  Build target:
    Files: hermes_forex/adapters/price.py
    Functions:
      async def fetch(pair: str, force: bool = False) -> Optional[dict]
      async def seed_history(pair: str) -> list
  Dependencies: Phase 1. Reference Appendix A: adapters/price.py block (loop.py:1612
    _last_candle_ts stale guard; fetch_with_retry at loop.py:1727).
  Success criteria:
    def test_fetch_keys_non_none():
        r = await fetch("EUR/USD")
        assert r is not None
        for k in ("price", "high", "low", "candle_ts", "ts"):
            assert r.get(k) is not None
    def test_stale_candle_guard():
        a = await fetch("EUR/USD"); b = await fetch("EUR/USD")  # same candle_ts within 60s
        if a and b and a["candle_ts"] == b["candle_ts"]:
            assert b is None   # stale-candle guard (loop.py:1612)
    def test_seed_history_count():
        h = await seed_history("BTC-USD")
        assert len(h) == 300   # [ASSUMED 300 — seed count not in Appendix A; source uses candle append loop]
    def test_yfinance_timeout_returns_none():
        with mock.patch("yfinance.download", side_effect=TimeoutError):
            r = await fetch("EUR/USD")
        assert r is None   # graceful, no exception
  How to run: pytest tests/test_price_adapter.py -k "keys or stale or seed or timeout"
  Failure definition: fetch raises instead of returning None on timeout, or seed_history
    length != 300 after fix, or missing keys -> PHASE 2 FAILED.
  Estimated LLM sessions: 0.

PHASE 3: Indicator engine
  Build target:
    Files: hermes_forex/indicators/__init__.py
    Functions: compute_rsi(prices, period=14); compute_atr(prices, period=14);
      compute_adx(prices, period=14); compute_bb(prices, period=20, mult=1.5)
  Dependencies: Phase 1. Reference Appendix A: compute_rsi loop.py:1792; compute_atr
    loop.py:1813; compute_roc loop.py:1803.
  Success criteria:
    def test_rsi_known_series():
        s = [100,102,101,103,102,104,103,105,104,106,103,101,99,100,102]
        r = compute_rsi(s, 14)
        assert abs(r - 47.3) < 0.1   # hand-computed Wilder RSI [ASSUMED 47.3 exact — recompute at test time]
    def test_atr_flat_zero():
        assert compute_atr([100]*20, 14) == 0
    def test_adx_range():
        r = compute_adx([100,101,99,102,98,103,97,104,96,105,95,106,94,107,93,108,92,109,91,110], 14)
        assert isinstance(r, float) and 0 <= r <= 100
    def test_bb_ordering():
        o = compute_bb([100,102,101,103,102,104,103,105,104,106,103,101,99,100,102,101,103,104,102,101], 20, 1.5)
        assert o["lower"] < o["middle"] < o["upper"]

PHASE 4: Entry signal engine (MR + RSI momentum)
  Build target:
    Files: hermes_forex/engines/entry.py
    Functions: def evaluate_entry(pair, prices, strategy, chart_context, open_trades, reentry_state) -> Optional[Signal]
  Dependencies: Phases 2,3. Reference loop.py entry gate L04 (session via _get_session
    loop.py:1778), chart hard-block, re-entry cooldown (RESOLVED in v4 — see Section 3
    L15/L23 and the test below, which already cites loop.py:3652/3787).
  Success criteria:
    def test_eur_mr_fires():
        sig = evaluate_entry("EUR/USD", prices_at_bb_lower, mr_strategy(rsi=38, session="LDN", adx=20), "", [], {})
        assert sig is not None and sig.type == "mean_reversion"
    def test_eur_mr_session_block():
        sig = evaluate_entry("EUR/USD", prices_at_bb_lower, mr_strategy(rsi=38, session="OTHER", adx=20), "", [], {})
        assert sig is None   # 18:00 UTC -> OTHER (loop.py:1783)
    def test_eur_mr_chart_block():
        sig = evaluate_entry("EUR/USD", prices_at_bb_lower, mr_strategy(rsi=38, session="LDN", adx=20), "avoid entirely", [], {})
        assert sig is None   # hard block
    def test_eur_mr_cooldown():
        reentry = {"EUR/USD": {"last_exit_cycle": CURRENT_CYCLE-15}}  # stopped out 15 cycles ago
        sig = evaluate_entry("EUR/USD", prices_at_bb_lower, mr_strategy(rsi=38, session="LDN", adx=20), "", [], reentry)
        assert sig is None   # re-entry cooldown < 30 cycles (loop.py:3652, loop.py:3787)
    def test_aud_rsi_fires():
        sig = evaluate_entry("AUD/USD", p, rsi_mom_strategy(rsi=41, session="ASIA", adx=22, vol_above=True, oversold_pairs=2), "", [], {})
        assert sig is not None and sig.type == "rsi_momentum"
    def test_aud_rsi_confluence():
        sig = evaluate_entry("AUD/USD", p, rsi_mom_strategy(rsi=41, session="ASIA", adx=22, vol_above=True, oversold_pairs=1), "", [], {})
        assert sig is None   # confluence requires >=2 oversold pairs (loop.py:2817)
  How to run: pytest tests/test_entry.py -k "mr or rsi"

PHASE 5: Exit engine
  Build target:
    Files: hermes_forex/engines/exit.py
    Functions: def evaluate_exit(trade, current_price, prices) -> Optional[Exit]
  Dependencies: Phase 3. Reference backtest.py sim() exit logic (loop.py backtest sim
    at backtest.py:578: stop=ep*(1-sl/100), target=ep*(1+tg/100), trailing, time_exit at
    idx-ei>=60; breakeven/partial RESOLVED in v4 — see corrected Section 3 L26/L27:
    breakeven at half target, partial-close at full target, Appendix A ~3362-3379).
  Success criteria:
    def test_stop_loss():
        ex = evaluate_exit(trade(1.1000, sl=1.5), 1.0834, None)
        assert ex.reason == "stop_loss"   # 1.1000*0.985=1.0835; 1.0834<=1.0835
    def test_profit_target():
        ex = evaluate_exit(trade(1.1000, tp=3.0), 1.1331, None)
        assert ex.reason == "profit_target"   # 1.1000*1.03=1.1330; 1.1331>=1.1330
    def test_time_exit():
        ex = evaluate_exit(trade(1.1000, held=361, time_exit_cycles=360), 1.1000, None)
        assert ex.reason == "time_exit"
    def test_breakeven():
        ex = evaluate_exit(trade(1.1000, unreal=1.5, target=3.0, sl_moved=False), 1.1165, None)
        assert ex.new_stop == 1.1000   # breakeven at target*0.5
    def test_partial_close():
        ex = evaluate_exit(trade(1.1000, held=101, target=3.0, partial=False), 1.1331, None)
        assert ex.partial_close_fraction == 0.5   # 50% when unrealised_pct >= profit_target_pct (full target 3.0% -> 1.1330, NOT target/2; loop.py:3216)
  How to run: pytest tests/test_exit.py -k "stop or target or time or breakeven or partial"

XAG/USD (CORRECTED — momentum, was wrongly MR):
  Strategy: rsi_momentum (NOT mean_reversion) | Session: 24h
  RSI threshold: 30 | Stop: 2.0% | Target: 4.0% | ATR mult: 2.0
  Time exit: 720 | adx_threshold 10 | atr_floor 0.5% | position_size_r 0.20
  allow_bear_entries: TRUE | Version: v02 → reset to momentum v01 in rebuild

SECTION 9: WHAT MUST NOT BE REPEATED (lessons learned)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
1. v06→v07 cliff: EUR/USD v06 = 92.9% WR (14t, +1.005%); v07 = 16.7% WR (6t, -0.114%).
   Root cause: MR bought long at lower BB while discovered ensemble showed
   strong_bearish — mechanical rule without context. Fix shipped: MR skips long if
   discovered consensus bearish/strong_bearish (L13). Lesson: never deploy a mechanical
   rule that ignores the ensemble context; always cross-check.
2. Code duplication: two near-identical 2600-line loop.py files drifted; fixes missed
   one side. Lesson: single shared engine; bots are config instances.
3. State mixed with code: state/ inside repo → lost on redeploy; recovery depended on
   dashboard uptime. Lesson: state on separate persistent volume, code read-only.
4. Gold strategy-type wrong from start: XAU/XAG set to mean_reversion (v01) though they
   are trending instruments; MR long-only loses in trends. Lesson: gold/silver = momentum.
5. Fear & Greed Index removed: FNG is a CRYPTO sentiment metric, meaningless for forex/
   gold. It was in an early build and removed. Lesson: do not import crypto-specific
   signals (FNG, BTC onchain, "bitcoin" news) into forex/gold — that is what the dead
   adapters (P4) represented.
6. Single-LLM → 3-model consensus: one LLM produced biased/unstable reflections;
   replaced with Gemini+Groq(DeepSeek distill)+DeepSeek, 2/3 vote, score guard.
   Lesson: never let one model unilaterally change live params.
7. "198 fake trades" bug: yfinance returned the same Friday candle all weekend; loop
   appended duplicates → indicators zeroed → spurious entries (71 fake EUR/USD alone).
   Rebuild prevents via stale-candle guard INSIDE the price adapter + flat-price guard.
8. Backtest built in wrong order: OOS validation was last; bad changes slipped through.
   Correct order = Phase 0 (yfinance OOS) FIRST, then 1 historical, 1.5 crisis, 2 walk-fwd,
   3 alpha, 4 regime, 5 confidence, 6 deploy. Lesson: OOS gate must be first, not last.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
