SECTION 11: GP ENGINE DEEP-DIVE (verified against source 2026-07-15)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

> This section consolidates the GP-engine analysis provided by the user, with
> every claim VERIFIED against actual source code. Items that did NOT verify are
> flagged explicitly so the rebuild does not chase phantom bugs.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
11.1 WHAT THE GP ENGINE ACTUALLY DOES (3 files + cron)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
- genetic_discovery.py  (forex ~536 lines / crypto 850 lines) — discovery algorithm
- gp_intelligence.py    — live governance of GP-discovered indicators
- backtest.py           — validation, registration, shadow/live promotion, degradation
- hermes_gp_cron.py     (253 lines) — weekly Sunday 02:00 UTC discovery run

DISCOVERY PHASE (verified params, genetic_discovery.py line 7, 64, 353, 441-444):
  200 random trees, depth<=4, 15 terminals (close, volume, DXY, VIX, TNX, SPX, oil, gold)
  50 generations; fitness = |Pearson(signal, next_candle_return)| - 0.001*complexity
  keep top 10% (min 15 survivors); 60% crossover / 40% mutation; tree cap 60 nodes
  AFTER evolution: test survivors on 40% holdout; accept ONLY if OOS corr >= 0.15
  CHANGELOG confirms 0.15 = 99th percentile of random-expression correlation.

REGISTRATION + SHADOW (backtest.py register_discovered_indicator):
  redundancy check (Pearson |r| > 0.8 vs existing -> REJECT)
  -> state/discovered/{PAIR}.json
  -> SHADOW mode (evaluates, never affects entries)
  -> track shadow WR; if acceptable -> promote to LIVE ensemble

LIVE ENSEMBLE (gp_intelligence.py, verified):
  weighted vote: total_weight = sum(fitness * WR); bullish = sum where signal>0.2
  signal = (bullish - (total-bullish)) / max(total, 0.001)
  Labels:  strong_bullish if >0.5 and >60% agree ; bullish if >0.2 and >50% agree ;
           bearish if <-0.2 and >50% agree ; strong_bearish if <-0.5 and >60% agree ;
           else conflict
  gp_entry_score() [line 248] defaults to -0.3 (suppress) until data accumulates.

THREE-STAGE GOVERNANCE (gp_intelligence.py, verified):
  Stage 1 — per-indicator WR tracking, by_regime bucketed (line 127-130), persistent lockout
  Stage 2 — dynamic allocation matrix keyed regime+adx+vol+session (_condition_key line 162)
  Stage 3 — market fingerprinting (similar_gp_entries line 201, nearest-neighbor)
  COMBINED gp_entry_score blend [line 248-279]:
    base -0.3; +regime bonus (BULL +0.3 / BEAR penalty line 259-262);
    +fingerprint WR term (wr-0.5)*0.6 (line 276); gate: score >= 0 required for entry.

CROSS-BOT SHARING (backtest.py line 1858 _SHARED_PAIRS):
  {EUR/USD,GBP/USD,AUD/USD,GBP/JPY} share; {XAU/USD,XAG/USD} share.
  CLAIM "shared indicators get 50% weight": NOT FOUND in gp_intelligence.py or backtest.py
  ensemble code. The 0.5 constants present are stop-loss clamps / WR>=0.5 thresholds,
  not a shared-indicator weight. Treated as UNVERIFIED — do not assume in rebuild.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
11.2 PROBLEMS FOUND — VERIFIED vs FLAGGED
─────────────────────────────────────────────

PROBLEM 1 — "Dual data contract: genetic_discovery passes list, _eval_expr expects dict"
  VERDICT: FALSE (phantom bug). _eval_expr (backtest.py:1211) explicitly handles BOTH:
    `if isinstance(data, dict): length = len(data.get("close",[])) else: length = len(data)`
  Comment: "data is a flat list (prices, backward compat) or a dict-of-lists".
  genetic_discovery._eval_tree (line 89) likewise handles both. The cron passes the same
  dict. NO mismatch exists. Do NOT add a "GPData TypedDict standardization" to fix this.

PROBLEM 2 — Cross-repo import breaks gold discovery  [VERIFIED — CRITICAL]
  hermes_gp_cron.py:11  `from hermes_forex.backtest import ...`
  hermes-gold/.../backtest.py:1492  `import hermes_forex.backtest as bm`
  -> Gold bot cannot run GP discovery standalone; cron is forex-only.
  FIX (rebuild): single shared engine package; cron parameterized by bot config.

PROBLEM 3 — Default score -0.3 over-suppresses new indicators  [VERIFIED — HIGH]
  gp_intelligence.py:253 `score = -0.3  # Default: slightly suppress`
  Gate requires score >= 0 for entry. New pair stuck at -0.3 -> never gets first 5 entries
  -> never accumulates data -> never rises above 0. Chicken-and-egg deadlock.
  Probe (L30) partially mitigates but also requires bullish+n>=2 which may not hold.
  FIX (rebuild): default 0.0 (neutral). First entries fire at neutral; after outcomes,
  real score computed; bad outcomes drive it below 0 -> suppressed.

PROBLEM 4 — Degradation != regime mismatch  [VERIFIED — MEDIUM]
  gp_intelligence Stage 1 buckets by_regime but cull logic uses global WR<40% over 50
  signals regardless of regime. Indicator trained in BULL, underperforms in NEUTRAL,
  gets culled; when BULL returns it is already gone.
  FIX (rebuild): separate cull (same-regime WR<40%) from weight penalty (regime mismatch).

PROBLEM 5 — Weekly-only discovery too infrequent  [VERIFIED — MEDIUM]
  Sunday 02:00 UTC only. A Monday regime shift runs stale indicators until next Sunday.
  FIX (rebuild): trigger mid-week rediscovery on 3+ consecutive GP losses for a pair.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
11.3 THE FIVE REBUILD FIXES (adjusted — Fix 1 dropped as phantom)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
FIX 2 (renumbered Fix 1) — Break chicken-and-egg deadlock:
  gp_entry_score_default = 0.0  (was -0.3). Neutral until data exists.
FIX 3 (was 2) — Separate regime mismatch from degradation in cull logic.
FIX 4 (was 3) — Parameterize cron by bot config (run for forex AND gold AND crypto).
FIX 5 (was 4) — Add triggered mid-week discovery on consecutive GP losses.
FIX 6 (was 5) — Add meta-learning layer (conditional ensemble) — POST-rebuild enhancement.

NOTE: The original "Fix 1 — standardize data contract to GPData TypedDict" is DROPPED
because the claimed contract mismatch does not exist in current code.

─────────────────────────────────────────────
11.4 SUMMARY TABLE (corrected)
─────────────────────────────────────────────
| Issue                                   | Severity | Verified? | Fix                    |
|-----------------------------------------|----------|-----------|------------------------|
| Dual data contract (list vs dict)       | claimed critical | FALSE phantom | DROPPED         |
| Cross-repo import — gold no GP          | critical | YES       | Shared engine + param cron |
| Chicken-egg score deadlock (-0.3)       | high     | YES       | Default 0.0            |
| Degradation != regime mismatch          | medium   | YES       | Split cull vs penalty  |
| Weekly-only discovery                    | medium   | YES       | Mid-week trigger       |
| No meta-learning layer                   | future   | N/A       | Post-rebuild           |
| "Shared indicators 50% weight"          | claimed  | UNVERIFIED| Investigate, don't assume |

### hermes-forex/hermes_forex/loop.py

```python
import asyncio
import json
import os
import subprocess
import time
import traceback
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
from hermes_forex.adapters.price import fetch as fetch_price
from hermes_forex.chart_vision import get_chart_context, get_all_chart_contexts

# ── Level 6 imports ──
try:
    from hermes_forex.crisis_learning import find_nearest_crisis, save_lived_crisis, get_crisis_recommendation
    _HAS_CRISIS = True
except ImportError:
    _HAS_CRISIS = False
    def _noop(*a, **kw): return None
    find_nearest_crisis = _noop
    save_lived_crisis = _noop
    get_crisis_recommendation = _noop

# ── Discord webhooks ──
_DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK = os.environ.get("DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK", "")
_DISCORD_REFLECTION_WEBHOOK = os.environ.get("DISCORD_REFLECTIONS_WEBHOOK", "")
_DISCORD_DAILY_WEBHOOK = os.environ.get("DISCORD_DAILY_WEBHOOK", "")
_DISCORD_WEBHOOKS_LOADED = False
_discord_session = None

def _load_discord_webhooks():
    """Lazy-load webhook URLs from state files if not set via env vars."""
    global _DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK, _DISCORD_REFLECTION_WEBHOOK, _DISCORD_DAILY_WEBHOOK, _DISCORD_WEBHOOKS_LOADED
    if _DISCORD_WEBHOOKS_LOADED:
        return
    _DISCORD_WEBHOOKS_LOADED = True
    try:
        if not _DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK:
            _wf = STATE_DIR / ".discord_alerts_webhook"
            if _wf.exists():
                _DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK = _wf.read_text().strip()
                print(f"[DISCORD] Loaded alerts webhook from state file", flush=True)
        if not _DISCORD_REFLECTION_WEBHOOK:
            _rf = STATE_DIR / ".discord_reflection_webhook"
            if _rf.exists():
                _DISCORD_REFLECTION_WEBHOOK = _rf.read_text().strip()
                print(f"[DISCORD] Loaded reflection webhook from state file", flush=True)
        if not _DISCORD_DAILY_WEBHOOK:
            _df = STATE_DIR / ".discord_daily_webhook"
            if _df.exists():
                _DISCORD_DAILY_WEBHOOK = _df.read_text().strip()
                print(f"[DISCORD] Loaded daily webhook from state file", flush=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[DISCORD] Webhook file load error: {e}", flush=True)

async def send_discord_alert(message: str, target: str = "alerts"):
    """Send an alert to Discord via webhook.
    target="alerts"     -> #bot-alerts webhook
    target="reflection"  -> #reflections webhook
    target="daily"       -> #daily-reports webhook
    Non-blocking — failures are silent."""
    _load_discord_webhooks()
    global _discord_session
    if target == "daily":
        url = _DISCORD_DAILY_WEBHOOK
    elif target == "reflection":
        url = _DISCORD_REFLECTION_WEBHOOK
    else:
        url = _DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK
    if not url:
        print(f"[DISCORD] SKIP: no webhook for target={target}", flush=True)
        return
    try:
        import httpx as _httpx
        if _discord_session is None:
            _discord_session = _httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=10)
        payload = {"content": message[:2000]}
        resp = await _discord_session.post(url, json=payload)
        if resp.status_code >= 400:
            print(f"[DISCORD] Webhook error {resp.status_code} ({target}): {resp.text[:200]}", flush=True)
        else:
            print(f"[DISCORD] Sent OK ({resp.status_code}) -> {target}", flush=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[DISCORD] Send failed ({target}): {e}", flush=True)

# ── Dashboard push ──
_DASHBOARD_URL = os.environ.get("DASHBOARD_API_URL", os.environ.get("RAILWAY_SERVICE_HERMES_DASHBOARD_API_URL", ""))
if _DASHBOARD_URL and not _DASHBOARD_URL.startswith("http"):
    _DASHBOARD_URL = f"https://{_DASHBOARD_URL}"
print(f"[DASHBOARD] Module load — _DASHBOARD_URL = '{_DASHBOARD_URL}'", flush=True)

async def push_to_dashboard(bot_name: str):
    """Push a JSON snapshot of current state to the dashboard backend.
    Called at the end of every cycle. Failures are non-critical."""
    if not _DASHBOARD_URL:
        print(f"[DASHBOARD] Skipping push — _DASHBOARD_URL is empty", flush=True)
        return
    try:
        import httpx as _httpx
        _push_url = f"{_DASHBOARD_URL}/api/ingest/{bot_name}"
        print(f"[DASHBOARD] Pushing to: {_push_url}", flush=True)
        strats = {}
        pairs_env = os.environ.get("FOREX_PAIRS", "EUR/USD,GBP/USD,AUD/USD,GBP/JPY")
        gold_pairs_env = os.environ.get("GOLD_PAIRS", "XAU/USD,XAG/USD")
        if bot_name in ("hermes-forex", "forex"):
            _pairs = [p.strip() for p in pairs_env.split(",")]
        elif bot_name in ("hermes-gold", "gold"):
            _pairs = [p.strip() for p in gold_pairs_env.split(",")]
        else:
            _pairs = [p.strip() for p in pairs_env.split(",")]
        for pair in _pairs:
            try:
                strats[pair] = load_strategy_for_pair(pair)
            except Exception:
                strats[pair] = {}
        hb = {}
        try:
            if HEARTBEAT_FILE.exists():
                hb = json.loads(HEARTBEAT_FILE.read_text())
        except Exception:
            pass
        # Expose discovery run timestamp for watchdog monitoring
        hb["last_discovery_run_ts"] = _last_discovery_run_ts
        trades = load_trades()
        goal = load_goal()
        skipped = load_skipped()
        hypotheses = []
        hyp_file = STATE_DIR / "hypotheses.jsonl"
        if hyp_file.exists():
            try:
                with open(hyp_file) as hf:
                    for line in hf:
                        line = line.strip()
                        if line:
                            hypotheses.append(json.loads(line))
            except Exception:
                pass
        # ── Level 6: Safety status ──
        flatlined_pairs = {}
        for pair in _pairs:
            fc = _flatline.get(pair, 0)
            if fc > 0:
                flatlined_pairs[pair] = {
                    "reason": _last_flatline_reason.get(pair, ""),
                    "flatline_expires_at_cycle": fc,
                    "consecutive_losses": _consecutive_losses.get(pair, 0),
                }
        snapshot = {
            "bot_name": bot_name,
            "ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "strategies": strats,
            "goal": goal,
            "heartbeat": hb,
            "recent_trades": trades[-50:],
            "recent_open_trades": list(_open_trades.values()),
            "recent_hypotheses": hypotheses[-20:] if hyp_file.exists() else [],
            "recent_skips": skipped[-50:],
            "flatlined_pairs": flatlined_pairs,
            # ── Discovered indicators for dashboard ──
            "discovered": {},
            # ── Cortex summary for dashboard ──
            "cortex": {},
        }
        try:
            from hermes_forex.backtest import load_discovered_indicators
            for pair in _pairs:
                inds = load_discovered_indicators(pair)
                if inds:
                    snapshot["discovered"][pair] = [{
                        "name": i.get("name","?"),
                        "expr": i.get("expr_str","")[:60],
                        "fitness": round(i.get("fitness",0),4),
                        "win_rate": i.get("win_rate",0),
                        "total_pnl": round(i.get("total_pnl",0),4),
                        "uses": [k for k in ["volume","dxy","vix","tnx","spx","oil","gold","btc","fvx","eem"]
                                 if k in i.get("expr_str","")],
                    } for i in inds]
        except Exception:
            pass
        # ── Cortex summary for dashboard ──
        try:
            from hermes_forex.decision_cortex import summary as cortex_summary, get_exiled_indicators
            from hermes_forex.decision_cortex import _load_json as _cj
            from hermes_forex.policy_engine import get_policy
            snapshot["cortex"] = {
                "summary": cortex_summary(),
                "exiled": list(get_exiled_indicators().keys()),
                "indicators": _cj("indicator_tracker.json"),
                "policy": get_policy(),
            }
            print(f"[CORTEX] Push data: {len(snapshot['cortex']['exiled'])} exiled, "
                  f"{snapshot['cortex']['summary']['entries_total']} entries tracked", flush=True)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[CORTEX] Push failed: {e}", flush=True)
        async with _httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=5) as client:
            resp = await client.post(_push_url, json=snapshot)
            print(f"[DASHBOARD] Push response: {resp.status_code} — {resp.text[:200]}", flush=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[DASHBOARD] Push failed (non-critical): {e}", flush=True)

STATE_DIR = Path("/app/state")
TRADES_FILE = STATE_DIR / "trades.jsonl"
STRATEGY_DIR = STATE_DIR / "strategies"
GOAL_FILE = STATE_DIR / "goal.yaml"
HEARTBEAT_FILE = STATE_DIR / "heartbeat.json"
CYCLE_SECONDS = 60
MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES = 5
RETRY_ATTEMPTS = 3
RETRY_BASE_DELAY = 2
CHART_ANALYSIS_INTERVAL = 3600  # 60 minutes

_price_histories = {}

def _recover_trades_from_dashboard():
    """On restart, restore trades.jsonl from dashboard API if local file is empty."""
    if TRADES_FILE.exists() and TRADES_FILE.stat().st_size > 100:
        return  # Already has data
    try:
        import httpx as _h
        bot_name = os.environ.get("HERMES_BOT_NAME", "forex")
        dash_url = os.environ.get("DASHBOARD_URL", "https://hermes-dashboard-api-production.up.railway.app")
        resp = _h.get(f"{dash_url}/api/bot/{bot_name}/trades?limit=200", timeout=15)
        if resp.status_code != 200:
            return
        trades = resp.json()
        if not isinstance(trades, list) or len(trades) == 0:
            return
        TRADES_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        recovered = 0
        with open(TRADES_FILE, "w") as f:
            for t in trades:
                if isinstance(t, dict) and t.get("pnl_pct") is not None:
                    f.write(json.dumps(t) + "\n")
                    recovered += 1
        print(f"[RECOVERY] Restored {recovered} trades from dashboard API", flush=True)
    except Exception:
        pass

_recover_trades_from_dashboard()

def _seed_default_state():
    """On startup, create default state files if the volume is empty.
    Handles the case where a fresh Railway volume is mounted at /app/state/
    with no seed data — the volume overrides the Dockerfile's COPY state ./state.

    On hermes-forex (which has a persistent volume and should NEVER need this
    after initial recovery), if this fires it means state was silently lost —
    logs CRITICAL + sends Discord alert."""
    from pathlib import Path as _P
    _state = _P("/app/state")
    _seeded_anything = False

    # ── goal.yaml ──
    _goal = _state / "goal.yaml"
    if not _goal.exists():
        try:
            _goal.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            _goal.write_text("""pairs:
  - EUR/USD
  - GBP/USD
  - AUD/USD
  - GBP/JPY
target_return_30d: 0.03
max_drawdown: 0.05
min_sharpe: 1.0
failure_below: -0.02
reflection_every: 5
one_variable_only: true
gemini_reflection: true
gemini_min_trades: 10
hypothesis_tracking: true
""")
            print(f"[SEED] Created {_goal}", flush=True)
            _seeded_anything = True
        except Exception as _e:
            print(f"[SEED] Failed to create goal.yaml: {_e}", flush=True)

    # ── strategies/ ──
    _strats = _state / "strategies"
    _strat_defaults = {
        "EUR_USD.yaml": """version: '07'
strategy_type: mean_reversion
entry:
  indicator: bollinger_band
  direction: long
  mr_entry_rsi: 40
  bb_std_dev: 1.5
  session_filter: london_only
stop_loss_pct: 1.5
profit_target_pct: 3.0
trailing_stop_pct: 0.5
time_exit_cycles: 360
position_size_r: 0.25
atr_multiplier: 1.5
minimum_entry_quality: 0
adx_threshold: 15
vol_threshold_pct: 0.10
vol_max_pct: 0.10
vol_min_pct: 0.02
""",
        "GBP_USD.yaml": """version: '09'
strategy_type: mean_reversion
entry:
  indicator: bollinger_band
  direction: long
  mr_entry_rsi: 42
  bb_std_dev: 2.0
  session_filter: 24h
stop_loss_pct: 1.5
profit_target_pct: 3.0
trailing_stop_pct: 0.5
time_exit_cycles: 360
position_size_r: 0.15
atr_multiplier: 1.5
use_atr_floor: true
atr_floor_pct: 0.2
allow_bear_entries: false
adx_threshold: 25
minimum_entry_quality: 0
vol_threshold_pct: 0.10
vol_max_pct: 0.12
vol_min_pct: 0.03
""",
        "AUD_USD.yaml": """version: '07'
strategy_type: rsi_momentum
entry:
  indicator: rsi
  threshold: 42
  direction: long
  session_filter: asian_only
stop_loss_pct: 1.5
profit_target_pct: 3.0
trailing_stop_pct: 0.5
time_exit_cycles: 360
position_size_r: 0.18
atr_multiplier: 1.5
minimum_entry_quality: 0
adx_threshold: 20
vol_threshold_pct: 0.10
vol_max_pct: 0.09
vol_min_pct: 0.02
use_atr_floor: true
atr_floor_pct: 0.3
""",
        "GBP_JPY.yaml": """version: '07'
strategy_type: mean_reversion
entry:
  indicator: bollinger_band
  direction: long
  mr_entry_rsi: 45
  bb_std_dev: 1.5
  session_filter: ny_only
stop_loss_pct: 1.5
profit_target_pct: 3.0
trailing_stop_pct: 0.5
time_exit_cycles: 360
position_size_r: 0.15
atr_multiplier: 1.5
minimum_entry_quality: 0
adx_threshold: 15
vol_threshold_pct: 0.15
vol_max_pct: 0.15
vol_min_pct: 0.03
use_atr_floor: true
atr_floor_pct: 0.3
""",
    }
    try:
        _strats.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        for _fname, _content in _strat_defaults.items():
            _fp = _strats / _fname
            if not _fp.exists():
                _fp.write_text(_content)
                print(f"[SEED] Created {_fp}", flush=True)
                _seeded_anything = True
    except Exception as _e:
        print(f"[SEED] Failed to seed strategies/: {_e}", flush=True)

    # ── history/ (empty, for strategy archives) ──
    try:
        (_state / "history").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    except Exception:
        pass

    # ── discovered/ (empty, GP discovery will populate) ──
    try:
        (_state / "discovered").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    except Exception:
        pass

    # ── candles/ (empty, for backtest candle snapshots) ──
    try:
        (_state / "candles").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    except Exception:
        pass

    # ── If we seeded anything on hermes-forex, sound the alarm ──
    if _seeded_anything:
        import os as _os
        _bot = _os.environ.get("HERMES_BOT_NAME", "forex")
        print(f"\n{'='*60}", flush=True)
        print(f"[CRITICAL] {_bot}: State files missing at startup!", flush=True)
        print(f"[CRITICAL] Volume at /app/state is empty or unreachable.", flush=True)
        print(f"[CRITICAL] goal.yaml and strategy YAMLs were re-seeded.", flush=True)
        print(f"[CRITICAL] All entries, hypotheses, indicator stats, exiles,", flush=True)
        print(f"[CRITICAL] and policy decisions from prior runs are LOST.", flush=True)
        print(f"{'='*60}\n", flush=True)
        _wh = _os.environ.get("DISCORD_ALERTS_WEBHOOK", "")
        if not _wh:
            _whf = _state / ".discord_alerts_webhook"
            if _whf.exists():
                _wh = _whf.read_text().strip()
        if _wh:
            try:
                import httpx as _hx
                _hx.post(_wh, json={
                    "content": "🚨 **CRITICAL: {} state recovery**\n"
                               "Volume at `/app/state` was EMPTY at startup.\n"
                               "All historical state (entries, hypotheses,\n"
                               "indicators, exiles, policy) LOST.\n"
                               "Default goal.yaml + strategy files re-seeded.\n"
                               "⚠️ Should never happen on volume-equipped service.".format(_bot)
                }, timeout=5)
                print(f"[CRITICAL] Discord alert sent.", flush=True)
            except Exception:
                pass

_seed_default_state()

_volume_histories = {}
_open_trades = {}
_stop_loss_blocklist = {}  # symbol -> cycle when stop-loss fired (prevents immediate re-entry)
_chart_state = {"contexts": {}, "last_analysis_ts": 0.0}
_adx_bypass_cycles = {}  # pair -> consecutive cycles ADX was below threshold
_last_candle_ts = {}  # pair -> ISO timestamp of last appended candle (prevents indicator pollution during market closures)
_market_closed = False  # True when all pairs are returning stale candles (weekend/holiday)

# ── Level 6: Self-Preservation Chain state ──
_flatline = {}  # pair -> cycle when flatline expires (0 = no flatline). Checked before entry.
_consecutive_losses = {}  # pair -> counter of consecutive stop-loss exits
_gp_consecutive_bad = {}  # pair -> consecutive losing GP ensemble entries (resets on win)
_last_flatline_reason = {}  # pair -> string reason for dashboard display
_flatline_log = []  # list of flatline events, capped at 100
_feature_training_buffer = {}  # pair -> list of feature vectors for novelty detection (rolling window)

# ── GP Intelligence (Stages 1-3) ──
_gp_intel = None  # Lazy init
def _get_gp_intel():
    global _gp_intel
    if _gp_intel is None:
        try:
            from hermes_forex.gp_intelligence import GpIntelligence
            _gp_intel = GpIntelligence()
        except Exception:
            _gp_intel = False  # Sentinel
    return _gp_intel if _gp_intel is not False else None
_NOVELTY_THRESHOLD_MULT = 3.0  # how many median-distances before flagging as novel
_FEATURE_WINDOW = 500  # max feature vectors to keep for training
_ANOMALY_DIM = 9  # feature vector dimension

# ── Weekly GP discovery guard (persisted in safety state) ──
_last_discovery_run_ts = None

# ── Safety state persistence (survives restarts) ──
_SAFETY_STATE_FILE = STATE_DIR / ".safety_state.json"

def _load_safety_state():
    """Load flatline + consecutive-loss + stop-loss-blocklist + discovery ts from disk."""
    global _last_discovery_run_ts
    if _SAFETY_STATE_FILE.exists():
        try:
            data = json.loads(_SAFETY_STATE_FILE.read_text())
            _flatline.update(data.get("flatline", {}))
            _consecutive_losses.update(data.get("consecutive_losses", {}))
            _stop_loss_blocklist.update(data.get("stop_loss_blocklist", {}))
            _gp_consecutive_bad.update(data.get("gp_consecutive_bad", {}))
            _last_discovery_run_ts = data.get("last_discovery_run_ts")
            print(f"[SAFETY] Restored state: {len(_flatline)} flatlined, "
                  f"{len(_consecutive_losses)} consecutive-loss counters", flush=True)
        except Exception:
            pass

def _save_safety_state():
    """Persist flatline + consecutive-loss + stop-loss-blocklist + discovery ts to disk."""
    try:
        data = {
            "flatline": dict(_flatline),
            "consecutive_losses": dict(_consecutive_losses),
            "stop_loss_blocklist": dict(_stop_loss_blocklist),
            "gp_consecutive_bad": dict(_gp_consecutive_bad),
            "last_discovery_run_ts": _last_discovery_run_ts,
        }
        _SAFETY_STATE_FILE.write_text(json.dumps(data))
    except Exception:
        pass

_load_safety_state()

# ── Reflection latch (file-based, persists across restarts) ──
# Per-pair latch: tracks {pair: {"version": str, "reflected_count": int}}
_REFLECTION_LATCH_FILE = STATE_DIR / ".reflection_latches.json"

def _load_reflection_latches():
    try:
        if _REFLECTION_LATCH_FILE.exists():
            return json.loads(_REFLECTION_LATCH_FILE.read_text())
    except Exception:
        return {}
    return {}

def _save_reflection_latches(latches):
    try:
        _REFLECTION_LATCH_FILE.write_text(json.dumps(latches))
    except Exception:
        pass

def _is_reflection_done(pair, closed_count):
    latches = _load_reflection_latches()
    entry = latches.get(pair)
    if entry is None:
        return False
    # Done if we already reflected at this trade count (NOT version-keyed — prevents rapid-fire cascade)
    return entry.get("reflected_count") == closed_count

def _mark_reflection_done(pair, closed_count):
    latches = _load_reflection_latches()
    latches[pair] = {"reflected_count": closed_count}
    _save_reflection_latches(latches)

def _strategy_filename(pair):
    return pair.replace("/", "_").replace("-", "_") + ".yaml"

def load_strategy_for_pair(pair):
    per_pair = STRATEGY_DIR / _strategy_filename(pair)
    if per_pair.exists():
        with open(per_pair) as f:
            data = yaml.safe_load(f)
            from hermes_forex.reflect import validate_strategy_params
            validate_strategy_params(data, raise_on_fail=False)
            return data
    default = STATE_DIR / "strategy.yaml"
    if default.exists():
        with open(default) as f:
            data = yaml.safe_load(f)
            from hermes_forex.reflect import validate_strategy_params
            validate_strategy_params(data, raise_on_fail=False)
            return data
    raise FileNotFoundError(f"No strategy for {pair}")

async def fetch_with_retry(fetch_fn, name):
    for attempt in range(1, RETRY_ATTEMPTS + 1):
        try:
            return await fetch_fn()
        except Exception as e:
            delay = RETRY_BASE_DELAY ** attempt
            print(f"[{name}] Attempt {attempt} failed: {e}. Retrying in {delay}s...", flush=True)
            await asyncio.sleep(delay)
    print(f"[{name}] All attempts failed.", flush=True)
    return {}

def load_goal():
    with open(GOAL_FILE) as f:
        return yaml.safe_load(f)

def load_trades():
    if not TRADES_FILE.exists():
        return []
    trades = []
    with open(TRADES_FILE) as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if line:
                trades.append(json.loads(line))
    return trades

import tempfile


def _atomic_write(path, data, mode="w"):
    """Atomic file write: write to temp then rename to prevent partial writes."""
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode=mode, dir=str(path.parent), delete=False, suffix=".tmp")
    try:
        if isinstance(data, str):
            tmp.write(data)
        else:
            json.dump(data, tmp, indent=2)
        tmp.flush()
        os.fsync(tmp.fileno())
        tmp.close()
        os.replace(tmp.name, str(path))
    except Exception:
        try: os.unlink(tmp.name)
        except: pass
        raise


def write_heartbeat(asset, cycle, consecutive_failures, last_price):
    data = {"ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(), "asset": asset, "cycle": cycle, "consecutive_failures": consecutive_failures, "last_price": last_price, "status": "ok" if consecutive_failures < MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES else "circuit_open"}
    _atomic_write(HEARTBEAT_FILE, data)

def _get_session(hour):
    """Classify UTC hour into trading session."""
    if 8 <= hour < 17: return "LDN"
    if 13 <= hour < 21: return "NY"
    if 0 <= hour < 8: return "ASIA"
    return "OTHER"

def _get_day_name(ts_iso):
    """Return day of week name from ISO timestamp."""
    try:
        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(ts_iso)
        return dt.strftime("%A")
    except Exception: return "UNKNOWN"

def compute_rsi(prices, period=14):
    if len(prices) < period + 1:
        return 50.0
    deltas = [prices[i] - prices[i-1] for i in range(1, len(prices))]
    gains = [d for d in deltas if d > 0]
    losses = [-d for d in deltas if d < 0]
    avg_gain = sum(gains[-period:]) / period if gains else 0
    avg_loss = sum(losses[-period:]) / period if losses else 1e-10
    rs = avg_gain / avg_loss
    return 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))

def compute_roc(prices, period=20):
    """Rate of change over N periods. Negative = price declining."""
    if len(prices) < period + 1:
        return 0.0
    old = prices[-(period + 1)]
    new = prices[-1]
    if old == 0:
        return 0.0
    return (new - old) / old * 100

def compute_atr(prices, period=14):
    """Average True Range using Wilder's smoothing. Uses close-to-close TR."""
    if len(prices) < period + 1:
        return None
    trs = [abs(prices[i] - prices[i-1]) for i in range(1, len(prices))]
    if len(trs) < period:
        return None
    atr = sum(trs[:period]) / period
    for tr in trs[period:]:
        atr = (atr * (period - 1) + tr) / period
    return atr


def compute_avg_volume(volumes, period=20):
    """Return the average of the last `period` volume values, or None if not enough data."""
    if len(volumes) < period + 1:
        return None
    return sum(volumes[-(period):]) / period


def compute_regime(prices):
    """Classify market regime using 50-period and 200-period moving averages.
    BULL: price > 50MA > 200MA (full size)
    NEUTRAL: price between the two MAs (reduce size 40%)
    BEAR: price < 50MA and price < 200MA (skip long entries)"""
    if len(prices) < 200:
        return "NEUTRAL"
    ma50 = sum(prices[-50:]) / 50
    ma200 = sum(prices[-200:]) / 200
    last = prices[-1]
    if last > ma50 and ma50 > ma200:
        return "BULL"
    elif last < ma50 and last < ma200:
        return "BEAR"
    else:
        return "NEUTRAL"


def compute_regime_fast(prices):
    """Fast regime: 20/50 EMA cross for entry timing.
    Returns (regime, ma20, ma50).
    BULL: ma20 > ma50 and price > both (momentum up).
    BEAR: ma20 < ma50 and price < both (momentum down).
    NEUTRAL: everything else."""
    if len(prices) < 50:
        return "NEUTRAL", None, None
    closes = prices
    # EMA: alpha = 2/(N+1)
    alpha20 = 2 / 21
    alpha50 = 2 / 51
    ema20 = closes[0]
    ema50 = closes[0]
    for p in closes[1:]:
        ema20 = p * alpha20 + ema20 * (1 - alpha20)
        ema50 = p * alpha50 + ema50 * (1 - alpha50)
    last = closes[-1]
    if ema20 > ema50 and last > ema20:
        return "BULL", ema20, ema50
    elif ema20 < ema50 and last < ema20:
        return "BEAR", ema20, ema50
    else:
        return "NEUTRAL", ema20, ema50


def compute_rsi_divergence(prices, period=14):
    """Detect bullish divergence: price makes lower low but RSI makes higher low.
    Uses a sliding window RSI comparison at two swing low points."""
    if len(prices) < period + 20:
        return False
    # Find two swing lows in last 20 candles
    recent = prices[-20:]
    lows = []
    for i in range(2, len(recent) - 2):
        if recent[i] < recent[i-1] and recent[i] < recent[i-2] and recent[i] < recent[i+1] and recent[i] < recent[i+2]:
            lows.append((i, recent[i]))
    if len(lows) < 2:
        return False
    # Take the two most recent swing lows
    idx1, price1 = lows[-2]
    idx2, price2 = lows[-1]
    if not (price2 < price1):  # Need lower low in price
        return False
    # Compute RSI at each swing low point (using window from start to that point)
    rsi_at_low1 = compute_rsi(prices[:len(prices)-20+idx1+1], period)
    rsi_at_low2 = compute_rsi(prices[:len(prices)-20+idx2+1], period)
    if rsi_at_low1 is None or rsi_at_low2 is None:
        return False
    # Bullish divergence: price lower low, RSI higher low
    return rsi_at_low2 > rsi_at_low1


def compute_entry_quality_score(rsi, threshold, regime, volume_above_avg, fg_boost=False, adx_above=False, fast_regime="NEUTRAL", divergence=False, session_bonus=0, daily_rsi_bonus=0):
    """Compute entry quality score 0-10 with enhanced scoring."""
    score = 0
    # RSI margin — ratio-based: deeper oversold = higher score
    rsi_margin = threshold - rsi
    rsi_ratio = rsi_margin / max(threshold, 1)  # how far below threshold as a fraction
    if rsi_ratio >= 0.4: score += 3       # 40%+ below threshold (e.g., RSI 24 vs threshold 40)
    elif rsi_ratio >= 0.25: score += 2    # 25%+ below
    elif rsi_ratio > 0: score += 1        # any margin
    # Regime (slow 50/200)
    if regime == "BULL": score += 2
    elif regime == "NEUTRAL": score += 1
    # Fast regime (20/50 EMA) — timing bonus
    if fast_regime == "BULL": score += 1
    elif fast_regime == "BEAR": score -= 1  # penalty for buying into EMA downtrend
    # Volume
    if volume_above_avg: score += 2
    # Fear & Greed (crypto only)
    if fg_boost: score += 2
    # ADX
    if adx_above: score += 1
    # Divergence bonus
    if divergence: score += 1
    # Session quality bonus
    score += session_bonus
    # Multi-timeframe RSI bonus (Layer 20): daily trend confluence
    score += daily_rsi_bonus
    return max(0, min(10, score))

# Cache for fetched calendar events
_CALENDAR_CACHE = {"events": [], "ts": 0.0}
_CALENDAR_CACHE_TTL = 3600  # 1 hour

def _fetch_calendar_events():
    """Fetch upcoming economic events from FMP API. Cached for 1 hour.
    Returns list of {time_str, name, zone, label}."""
    global _CALENDAR_CACHE
    now = time.time()
    if _CALENDAR_CACHE["events"] and (now - _CALENDAR_CACHE["ts"]) < _CALENDAR_CACHE_TTL:
        return _CALENDAR_CACHE["events"]
    events = []
    try:
        api_key = os.environ.get("FINANCIALMODELINGPREP_API_KEY", "")
        if api_key:
            import httpx as _cal_httpx
            resp = _cal_httpx.get(
                f"https://financialmodelingprep.com/api/v3/economic_calendar",
                params={"apikey": api_key, "from": datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")},
                timeout=10
            )
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                data = resp.json()
                for item in data[:50]:  # next 50 events
                    try:
                        dt_str = item.get("date", "")
                        event_name = item.get("event", "")
                        impact = item.get("impact", "").lower()
                        if not dt_str or "high" not in impact:
                            continue
                        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(dt_str.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
                        h, m = dt.hour, dt.minute
                        events.append({
                            "time_str": f"{h:02d}:{m:02d}",
                            "name": event_name.replace(" ", ""),
                            "zone": "US",
                            "label": event_name,
                        })
                    except Exception:
                        pass
    except Exception:
        pass
    if events:
        _CALENDAR_CACHE = {"events": events, "ts": now}
        return events
    return _CALENDAR_CACHE.get("events", [])

def _get_zones_for_pair(pair):
    """Return list of economic zones relevant to this pair."""
    return _PAIR_ZONES.get(pair.replace("-", "/"), ["US"])

def _is_fomc_week():
    """Approximate FOMC week: 8 meetings/year, ~every 6 weeks."""
    # Simplified: week-of-year mod 6 ≈ 0 is FOMC week (rough)
    import datetime as _dt
    iso = _dt.date.today().isocalendar()
    week = iso[1]
    # FOMC months: ~Jan, Mar, May, Jun, Jul, Sep, Nov, Dec
    fomc_months = {1, 3, 5, 6, 7, 9, 11, 12}
    month = _dt.date.today().month
    if month in fomc_months:
        return week % 6 < 2  # first or second week of FOMC months
    return False

def _is_first_friday():
    """Check if today is the first Friday of the month (NFP day)."""
    from datetime import date as _dd
    today = _dd.today()
    if today.weekday() != 4:  # Not Friday
        return False
    return today.day <= 7

def _is_near_economic_event(pair=None):
    """Block entries 10min before/after major economic events.
    Zone-aware: checks events relevant to the pair's economic zones.
    Returns (bool, event_name)."""
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    today = now.date()
    weekday = now.weekday()
    if weekday >= 5:  # Weekend
        return False, ""

    # Determine which zones to check
    zones = _get_zones_for_pair(pair) if pair else ["US"]

    # Check hardcoded zone events first
    for zone in zones:
        zone_data = _ECONOMIC_ZONES.get(zone, {})
        for name, spec in zone_data.get("events", {}).items():
            event_time = spec["time"]
            label = spec["label"]
            day_rule = spec.get("day", "monthly")

            # Check day-specific rules
            if day_rule == "first_friday":
                if not _is_first_friday():
                    continue
            elif day_rule == "fomc_schedule":
                if not _is_fomc_week() or weekday not in (1, 2, 3):  # Tue-Thu
                    continue
            elif day_rule == "fomc_minutes":
                if not _is_fomc_week() or weekday != 3:  # Wednesday
                    continue
            elif day_rule == "thursday":
                if weekday != 3:
                    continue
            elif day_rule == "monthly":
                if today.day > 28:  # Events usually in first 3 weeks
                    continue
            elif day_rule == "quarterly":
                if today.month not in (1, 4, 7, 10) or today.day > 15:
                    continue

            h, m = map(int, event_time.split(":"))
            event_dt = now.replace(hour=h, minute=m, second=0, microsecond=0)
            diff = abs((now - event_dt).total_seconds())
            if diff <= _ECONOMIC_BUFFER:
                return True, label

    # Check API-fetched events
    fetched = _fetch_calendar_events()
    for ev in fetched:
        h, m = map(int, ev["time_str"].split(":"))
        event_dt = now.replace(hour=h, minute=m, second=0, microsecond=0)
        diff = abs((now - event_dt).total_seconds())
        if diff <= _ECONOMIC_BUFFER:
            return True, ev["label"]

    return False, ""

# ── PHASE 1a: Anomaly Detection / Feature Extraction ──

def _extract_features(prices, volumes, pair=None):
    """Compute feature vector for current market state.
    Returns list of 9 features or None if insufficient data.
    Features: 5m ATR/pct, 1h ATR/pct, RSI(14), ADX(14), volume ratio,
    spread proxy, session hour, day of week, price/MA50 ratio."""
    if len(prices) < 60:
        return None
    # 5m ATR / price %
    atr_5m = compute_atr(prices, period=14)
    if atr_5m is None or atr_5m <= 0:
        return None
    atr_pct_5m = atr_5m / prices[-1] * 100
    # 1h ATR / price % (12 periods of 5m data)
    atr_1h = compute_atr(prices, period=12)
    if atr_1h is None or atr_1h <= 0:
        return None
    atr_pct_1h = atr_1h / prices[-1] * 100
    # RSI(14)
    rsi = compute_rsi(prices, period=14)
    if rsi is None:
        return None
    # ADX(14)
    adx = compute_adx(prices, period=14)
    if adx is None:
        adx = 0.0
    # Volume ratio (5m vs 1h) — use range-based proxy
    if volumes and len(volumes) >= 12:
        vol_5m = sum(volumes[-3:]) / 3 if len(volumes) >= 3 else volumes[-1]
        vol_1h = sum(volumes[-12:]) / 12 if len(volumes) >= 12 else sum(volumes) / len(volumes)
        vol_ratio = vol_5m / max(vol_1h, 0.0001)
    else:
        vol_ratio = 1.0
    # Spread proxy: range-based (high-low)/close — wider = more spread
    spread_proxy = atr_pct_5m * 0.3  # approximation
    # Session hour (0-23) / 23 as float
    session_hour = datetime.now(timezone.utc).hour / 23.0
    # Day of week (0-6) / 6 as float
    day_of_week = datetime.now(timezone.utc).weekday() / 6.0
    # Price / MA50 ratio
    ma50 = sum(prices[-50:]) / 50 if len(prices) >= 50 else prices[-1]
    price_ma_ratio = prices[-1] / max(ma50, 0.0001)
    return [
        round(atr_pct_5m, 6),
        round(atr_pct_1h, 6),
        round(rsi / 100.0, 4),
        round(adx / 100.0, 4),
        round(vol_ratio, 4),
        round(spread_proxy, 6),
        round(session_hour, 4),
        round(day_of_week, 4),
        round(price_ma_ratio, 4),
    ]


def _normalize_features(features, training_buf):
    """Normalize feature vector to [0,1] range using training data min/max.
    Falls back to identity if training_buf is empty."""
    if not training_buf:
        return features[:]
    normalized = []
    for i, val in enumerate(features):
        vals = [f[i] for f in training_buf if i < len(f)]
        if not vals:
            normalized.append(val)
            continue
        mn = min(vals)
        mx = max(vals)
        if mx - mn < 0.000001:
            normalized.append(0.5)
        else:
            normalized.append((val - mn) / (mx - mn))
    return normalized


def _compute_novelty_score(features, training_buf):
    """Compute novelty score = distance to nearest neighbor in training data.
    Returns (score, is_novel, median_dist).
    is_novel = score > _NOVELTY_THRESHOLD_MULT * median_dist."""
    if len(training_buf) < 20:
        return 0.0, False, 0.0
    # Compute distances to all training vectors
    distances = []
    for tf in training_buf:
        if len(tf) != len(features):
            continue
        sq_sum = sum((features[i] - tf[i]) ** 2 for i in range(len(features)))
        distances.append(sq_sum ** 0.5)
    if not distances:
        return 0.0, False, 0.0
    min_dist = min(distances)
    sorted_d = sorted(distances)
    median_idx = len(sorted_d) // 2
    median_dist = sorted_d[median_idx]
    threshold = _NOVELTY_THRESHOLD_MULT * median_dist
    is_novel = min_dist > threshold
    return round(min_dist, 6), is_novel, round(median_dist, 6)


def _is_novel_regime(pair, prices, volumes):
    """Check if current price action is in a novel regime.
    Returns (is_novel, score, reason_str)."""
    features = _extract_features(prices, volumes, pair)
    if features is None:
        return False, 0.0, "insufficient_data"
    # Update training buffer
    if pair not in _feature_training_buffer:
        _feature_training_buffer[pair] = []
    buf = _feature_training_buffer[pair]
    buf.append(features)
    if len(buf) > _FEATURE_WINDOW:
        buf.pop(0)
    # Normalize and score
    normed = _normalize_features(features, buf)
    buf_normed = [_normalize_features(f, buf) for f in buf[:-1]]  # exclude current
    score, is_novel, median_dist = _compute_novelty_score(normed, buf_normed)
    if is_novel:
        return True, score, f"novelty_score={score} median={median_dist} threshold={median_dist*_NOVELTY_THRESHOLD_MULT:.4f}"
    return False, score, "normal"


# ── PHASE 1b: Consecutive-Loss Cooldown ──

def _update_consecutive_losses(pair, exit_reason):
    """Update consecutive-loss counter and return flatline action.
    Returns (should_flatline, flatline_cycles, reason_str)."""
    if exit_reason == "stop_loss":
        _consecutive_losses[pair] = _consecutive_losses.get(pair, 0) + 1
        n = _consecutive_losses[pair]
        if n >= 5:
            return True, 360, f"{n} consecutive losses — reverting + 6h pause"
        elif n >= 3:
            return True, 120, f"{n} consecutive losses — cooling down 2h"
        else:
            msg = f"{n} consecutive loss{'es' if n > 1 else ''} — watching"
            print(f"[SAFETY] {pair}: {msg}", flush=True)
            return False, 0, msg
    elif exit_reason in ("profit_target", "trailing_stop"):
        _consecutive_losses[pair] = 0
        return False, 0, "profit_reset"
    return False, 0, ""


# ── PHASE 1c: Spread / Slippage Guard ──

def _check_spread(pair, current_price, stop_loss_pct):
    """Check if spread is too large relative to stop loss.
    Uses range-based spread proxy when real spread unavailable.
    Returns (should_skip, reason_str)."""
    try:
        # Try to get real spread from price adapter if available
        # Fallback: use ATR-based proxy spread
        prices = _price_histories.get(pair, [])
        if len(prices) >= 14:
            atr = compute_atr(prices, period=14)
            if atr is not None and atr > 0 and current_price > 0:
                spread_proxy = (atr * 0.3) / current_price * 100  # spread as % of price
                max_spread = stop_loss_pct / 3.0
                if spread_proxy > max_spread:
                    return True, f"spread_proxy={spread_proxy:.4f}% > stop/3={max_spread:.4f}%"
    except Exception:
        pass
    return False, ""


# ── Flatline logging ──

FLATLINE_LOG_FILE = STATE_DIR / "flatline_log.jsonl"

def _log_flatline(pair, reason, details=""):
    """Log flatline event to flatline_log.jsonl and in-memory cache."""
    entry = {
        "ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        "pair": pair,
        "reason": reason,
        "details": details,
    }
    _flatline_log.append(entry)
    if len(_flatline_log) > 100:
        _flatline_log.pop(0)
    try:
        with open(FLATLINE_LOG_FILE, "a") as f:
            f.write(json.dumps(entry) + "\n")
    except Exception:
        pass
    print(f"[FLATLINE] {pair}: {reason} | {details}", flush=True)
_DAILY_RSI_CACHE = {}  # pair -> {"rsi": float, "ts": timestamp}
_DAILY_RSI_TTL = 3600  # 1 hour

def _get_daily_rsi_bonus(pair):
    """Fetch daily RSI from yfinance and return quality bonus [-1, 0, +1].
    +1 if daily RSI < 40 (oversold on higher timeframe — bullish confluence).
    -1 if daily RSI > 70 (overbought on higher timeframe — reversal risk).
     0 otherwise or on failure.
    Cached for 1 hour to avoid excessive yfinance calls."""
    now_ts = time.time()
    cached = _DAILY_RSI_CACHE.get(pair)
    if cached and (now_ts - cached["ts"]) < _DAILY_RSI_TTL:
        return cached["bonus"]
    try:
        import yfinance as yf
        ticker = yf.Ticker(pair.replace("/", "") + "=X")
        df = ticker.history(period="1mo", interval="1d")
        if df.empty or len(df) < 20:
            _DAILY_RSI_CACHE[pair] = {"bonus": 0, "ts": now_ts}
            return 0
        closes = [float(x) for x in df["Close"].values.flatten() if str(x) != "nan"]
        if len(closes) < 14:
            _DAILY_RSI_CACHE[pair] = {"bonus": 0, "ts": now_ts}
            return 0
        daily_rsi = compute_rsi(closes, period=14)
        if daily_rsi is None:
            _DAILY_RSI_CACHE[pair] = {"bonus": 0, "ts": now_ts}
            return 0
        if daily_rsi < 40:
            bonus = 1
        elif daily_rsi > 70:
            bonus = -1
        else:
            bonus = 0
        _DAILY_RSI_CACHE[pair] = {"bonus": bonus, "ts": now_ts}
        print(f"[HTF RSI] {pair}: daily RSI = {daily_rsi:.1f} → bonus {bonus:+d}", flush=True)
        return bonus
    except Exception:
        _DAILY_RSI_CACHE[pair] = {"bonus": 0, "ts": now_ts}
        return 0

def session_quality_bonus():
    """Return quality score bonus based on current session.
    +1 during London/NY overlap (strongest liquidity).
    0 during London or NY alone.
    -1 during Sydney/Tokyo (thin liquidity)."""
    h = datetime.now(timezone.utc).hour
    if 12 <= h < 17:  # London-NY overlap
        return 1
    elif 7 <= h < 12 or 17 <= h < 22:  # London alone or NY alone
        return 0
    else:  # Sydney/Tokyo
        return -1


def check_correlation(pairs, rsi_values, thresholds):
    """Multi-pair correlation: check how many pairs are oversold.
    Returns (oversold_count, total_pairs, is_confirmed).
    is_confirmed = at least 2 pairs are oversold (confluence)."""
    oversold = 0
    for pair in pairs:
        rsi = rsi_values.get(pair)
        threshold = thresholds.get(pair, 50)
        if rsi is not None and rsi < threshold:
            oversold += 1
    confirmed = oversold >= 2
    return oversold, len(pairs), confirmed


def compute_adx(prices, period=14):
    """Average Directional Index. Returns 0-100. >20 = trending, <20 = ranging.
    Uses close-only approximation (no high/low data from free APIs)."""
    if len(prices) < period * 2:
        return None
    # Approximate +DM and -DM from close-to-close changes
    plus_dm = []
    minus_dm = []
    for i in range(1, len(prices)):
        up = prices[i] - prices[i-1]
        down = prices[i-1] - prices[i]
        plus_dm.append(up if up > down and up > 0 else 0.0)
        minus_dm.append(down if down > up and down > 0 else 0.0)
    if len(plus_dm) < period:
        return None
    # Wilder's smoothing
    atr = sum(abs(prices[i] - prices[i-1]) for i in range(1, period + 1)) / period
    plus_di = 100.0
    minus_di = 100.0
    for i in range(period, len(plus_dm)):
        if atr > 0:
            plus_di = (plus_di * (period - 1) + (plus_dm[i] / atr * 100)) / period
            minus_di = (minus_di * (period - 1) + (minus_dm[i] / atr * 100)) / period
            atr = (atr * (period - 1) + abs(prices[i+1] - prices[i])) / period
        else:
            atr = 0.001
    if plus_di + minus_di == 0:
        return 0.0
    dx = abs(plus_di - minus_di) / (plus_di + minus_di) * 100
    return dx


def compute_bollinger(prices, period=20, num_std=2.0):
    """Compute Bollinger Bands.
    Returns (middle_band, upper_band, lower_band, bandwidth).
    Middle band = SMA(period).
    Upper/lower = middle ± num_std * stddev.
    Bandwidth = (upper - lower) / middle * 100.
    Returns None if not enough data."""
    if len(prices) < period:
        return None
    window = prices[-period:]
    middle = sum(window) / period
    variance = sum((p - middle) ** 2 for p in window) / period
    std = variance ** 0.5
    upper = middle + num_std * std
    lower = middle - num_std * std
    bandwidth = (upper - lower) / middle * 100 if middle != 0 else 0
    return middle, upper, lower, bandwidth


def is_ny_session():
    """Check if current UTC time is within NY session (13:00-22:00 UTC)."""
    h = datetime.now(timezone.utc).hour
    return 13 <= h < 22


def is_london_session():
    """Check if current UTC time is within London session (08:00-17:00 UTC)."""
    h = datetime.now(timezone.utc).hour
    return 8 <= h < 17


def is_asian_session():
    """Check if current UTC time is within Asian session (00:00-08:00 UTC)."""
    h = datetime.now(timezone.utc).hour
    return 0 <= h < 8


def get_pairs():
    pairs_env = os.environ.get("FOREX_PAIRS", "EUR/USD,GBP/USD,AUD/USD,GBP/JPY")
    return [p.strip() for p in pairs_env.split(",") if p.strip()]


_SKIPPED_FILE = STATE_DIR / "skipped_signals.jsonl"
def load_skipped():
    if not _SKIPPED_FILE.exists():
        return []
    skipped = []
    with open(_SKIPPED_FILE) as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if line:
                skipped.append(json.loads(line))
    return skipped

def save_skipped(skipped):
    # Cap at last 500 entries to prevent unbounded growth on Railway volume
    if len(skipped) > 500:
        skipped = skipped[-500:]
    with open(_SKIPPED_FILE, "w") as f:
        for s in skipped:
            f.write(json.dumps(s) + "\n")

def log_skip(pair, reason, rsi, price, regime, adx=None):
    entry = {
        "ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        "pair": pair, "bot_id": "hermes-forex",
        "reason_skipped": reason,
        "rsi_at_skip": round(rsi, 2) if rsi is not None else "N/A",
        "price_at_skip": price,
        "regime_at_skip": regime,
        "adx_at_skip": round(adx, 1) if adx is not None else "N/A",
        "price_24h_later": None,
        "missed_pnl": None,
    }
    # Append-only write — no need to load entire file
    with open(_SKIPPED_FILE, "a") as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(entry) + "\n")
    print(f"[SKIP] {pair}: {reason} | RSI {rsi:.1f} @ {price:.5f}", flush=True)

async def backfill_skipped(pairs):
    """Update skips older than 24h with actual 24h-later price and missed PnL."""
    skipped = load_skipped()
    changed = False
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    for s in skipped:
        if s.get("price_24h_later") is not None:
            continue
        try:
            skip_ts = datetime.fromisoformat(s["ts"])
            age_h = (now - skip_ts).total_seconds() / 3600
            if age_h >= 24:
                pair = s["pair"]
                entry_price = s["price_at_skip"]
                os.environ["FOREX_PAIR"] = pair
                price_data = await fetch_with_retry(fetch_price, f"SKIP-BACKFILL-{pair}")
                if price_data and "price" in price_data:
                    current_price = float(price_data["price"])
                    # --- Stale candle guard: don't append the same candle twice ---
                    candle_ts = price_data.get("candle_ts", "")
                    if candle_ts and candle_ts == _last_candle_ts.get(pair):
                        continue
                    _last_candle_ts[pair] = candle_ts
                    # --- end stale candle guard ---
                    s["price_24h_later"] = current_price
                    s["missed_pnl"] = round((current_price - entry_price) / entry_price * 100, 4)
                    changed = True
                    print(f"[SKIP-BACKFILL] {pair}: entry {entry_price:.5f} -> 24h {current_price:.5f} | missed PnL: {s['missed_pnl']:+.4f}%", flush=True)
        except Exception:
            pass
    if changed:
        save_skipped(skipped)


async def seed_forex_price_history(pairs):
    """Pre-seed forex price history on startup using 5 days of real 5m candles.
    This gives RSI, ATR, regime, ADX, and Bollinger accurate values from cycle 1."""
    from hermes_forex.adapters.price import fetch_history_df
    for pair in pairs:
        try:
            df = fetch_history_df(pair, period="5d")
            if df is None or len(df) < 20:
                print(f"[SEED] {pair}: insufficient 5m data, will accumulate live", flush=True)
                continue

            closes = df["Close"].dropna().tolist()
            highs  = df["High"].dropna().tolist()
            lows   = df["Low"].dropna().tolist()

            _price_histories[pair] = closes[-300:]

            # Volume proxy: realised range = (high - low) / close * 10000 (pips)
            vols = []
            for i in range(min(len(closes), len(highs), len(lows))):
                if closes[i] > 0 and highs[i] > lows[i]:
                    vols.append((highs[i] - lows[i]) / closes[i] * 10000)
            if vols:
                _volume_histories[pair] = vols[-300:]

            rsi    = compute_rsi(closes)
            atr    = compute_atr(closes)
            regime = compute_regime(closes)
            adx    = compute_adx(closes)
            print(
                f"[SEED] {pair}: {len(closes)} x 5m candles | "
                f"RSI: {rsi:.1f} | ATR: {atr:.6f} | Regime: {regime} | ADX: {adx:.1f}",
                flush=True,
            )
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[SEED] {pair}: failed ({e}), will accumulate live", flush=True)


async def fetch_pair_price(pair):
    os.environ["FOREX_PAIR"] = pair
    return await fetch_price()


async def run_loop(run_once=False):
    global _price_histories, _open_trades, _market_closed
    pairs = get_pairs()
    cycle = 0
    consecutive_failures = 0
    print(f"[{datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}] Starting multi-pair forex bot for {', '.join(pairs)}.", flush=True)
    # Pre-seed price history from yfinance so RSI/ATR/regime/ADX are real from cycle 1
    await seed_forex_price_history(pairs)

    # ── Schedule weekly GP discovery (runs in background as subprocess) ──
    async def _run_weekly_discovery():
        """Spawn genetic_discovery.py as subprocess for each pair if 7+ days since last run."""
        global _last_discovery_run_ts
        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        if _last_discovery_run_ts and not os.environ.get("FORCE_GP_DISCOVERY"):
            last = datetime.fromisoformat(_last_discovery_run_ts)
            if (now - last).total_seconds() < 7 * 86400:
                return
        start_wall = time.time()
        print(f"[GP WEEKLY] Discovery window open — running for {len(pairs)} pairs", flush=True)
        results = []
        for pair in pairs:
            print(f"[GP WEEKLY] Spawning discovery for {pair}...", flush=True)
            pair_start = time.time()
            status = "ok"
            try:
                proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                    "python", "-c",
                    f"from hermes_forex.genetic_discovery import run_and_register as r; r('{pair}')",
                    stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE, stderr=asyncio.subprocess.STDOUT,
                )
                stdout, _ = await asyncio.wait_for(proc.communicate(), timeout=900)
                output = stdout.decode() if stdout else ""
                indicator_count = "0?"
                for _l in output.split("\n"):
                    if "registered" in _l and "new indicators" in _l:
                        try:
                            indicator_count = _l.split("registered")[1].split("new")[0].strip()
                        except Exception:
                            pass
                if proc.returncode == 0:
                    output = stdout.decode() if stdout else ""
                    for _l in output.split("\n"):
                        if "Walk-forward complete" in _l:
                            print(f"[GP WEEKLY] {pair} {_l.strip()}", flush=True)
                    print(f"[GP WEEKLY] {pair} completed (exit 0) — {indicator_count}", flush=True)
                else:
                    output = stdout.decode() if stdout else ""
                    status = f"FAILED (exit {proc.returncode})"
                    print(f"[GP WEEKLY] {pair} {status}:\n{output}", flush=True)
            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
                proc.kill()
                status = "TIMEOUT"
                indicator_count = "N/A"
                print(f"[GP WEEKLY] {pair} TIMEOUT after 900s — killed", flush=True)
            except Exception as e:
                status = f"ERROR: {e}"
                indicator_count = "N/A"
                print(f"[GP WEEKLY] {pair} error: {e}", flush=True)
            elapsed = time.time() - pair_start
            results.append((pair, status, elapsed, indicator_count))
        _last_discovery_run_ts = now.isoformat()
        _save_safety_state()
        wall_time = time.time() - start_wall
        # Build Discord summary
        indicator_total = sum(
            int(c.split("/")[0]) for _, s, _, c in results
            if s == "ok" and c not in ("0?", "N/A") and "/" in c
        )
        lines = [f"**🔬 GP Discovery — forex** ({int(wall_time)}s, {indicator_total} indicators)"]
        for pair, status, elapsed, indicator_count in results:
            emoji = "✅" if status == "ok" else "⚠️"
            ind = f" | {indicator_count}" if status == "ok" else ""
            lines.append(f"{emoji} `{pair}`: {status} ({elapsed:.0f}s{ind})")
        lines.append(f"📅 Next run after: `{_last_discovery_run_ts[:19]}`")
        await send_discord_alert("\n".join(lines), target="alerts")
        print(f"[GP WEEKLY] Complete. Next run after {_last_discovery_run_ts}", flush=True)

    asyncio.create_task(_run_weekly_discovery())

    while True:
        cycle += 1
        print(f"[CYCLE {cycle}] {datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}", flush=True)
        try:
            if consecutive_failures >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES:
                print(f"[CIRCUIT OPEN] {consecutive_failures} consecutive failures. Waiting 5 min.", flush=True)
                await asyncio.sleep(300)
                consecutive_failures = 0
                continue

            # ── Pause check: honor dashboard pause signal ──
            try:
                import httpx as _httpx_pulse
                pulse_url = f"{_DASHBOARD_URL}/api/bot/forex/pulse" if _DASHBOARD_URL else ""
                if pulse_url:
                    pr = await _httpx_pulse.AsyncClient(timeout=3).get(pulse_url)
                    if pr.status_code == 200:
                        pulse = pr.json()
                        if pulse.get("desired_state") == "paused":
                            print(f"[PAUSE] Bot paused via dashboard. Entering sleep mode.", flush=True)
                            await send_discord_alert("⏸ **Bot paused via dashboard — entering sleep mode.**")
                            # Internal pause: just sleep and re-check periodically instead of killing deployment
                            for _ in range(60):
                                await asyncio.sleep(60)
                            continue
            except Exception:
                pass  # If pause check fails, just keep running

            # Load per-pair strategies
            strategies = {}
            # FROZEN_PAIRS: pairs the user has deliberately parked (e.g. EUR/USD,
            # whose v06 archive is unrecoverable). maybe_auto_unpause will NOT touch
            # these, and they are forced back to paused every cycle until removed
            # from this set (typically after a fresh version promotion). Reversible:
            # delete the pair here.
            FROZEN_PAIRS = {"EUR/USD"}
            for pair in pairs:
                try:
                    strategies[pair] = load_strategy_for_pair(pair)
                    if pair in FROZEN_PAIRS:
                        # Respect the deliberate pause — do NOT self-heal this pair.
                        strategies[pair]["paused"] = True
                        strategies[pair].pop("paused_reatry_half_size", None)
                        from hermes_forex.reflect import save_strategy
                        save_strategy(pair, strategies[pair])
                        print(f"[FROZEN] {pair}: kept paused per explicit user decision (not auto-unpaused).", flush=True)
                        continue
                    # Self-healing unpause: a paused pair never closes trades,
                    # so combined_reflect never runs for it — unpause it here
                    # every cycle instead (rolling recovery or max-pause timeout).
                    from hermes_forex.reflect import maybe_auto_unpause
                    maybe_auto_unpause(pair, strategies[pair])
                except FileNotFoundError:
                    print(f"[WARN] No strategy for {pair}, skipping.", flush=True)

            # --- Check exits on all open trades first ---
            for asset in list(_open_trades.keys()):
                trade = _open_trades[asset]
                pair_strategy = strategies.get(asset)
                if not pair_strategy:
                    continue
                try:
                    price_data = await fetch_pair_price(asset)
                    if not price_data or "price" not in price_data:
                        continue
                    current_price = float(price_data["price"])
                    unrealised_pct = (current_price - trade["entry_price"]) / trade["entry_price"] * 100
                    trade["_unrealised_pct"] = round(unrealised_pct, 4)
                    trade["current_price"] = current_price
                    hold_cycles = cycle - trade.get("_entry_cycle", cycle)
                    if "_peak_price" not in trade:
                        trade["_peak_price"] = current_price
                    if "_low_price" not in trade:
                        trade["_low_price"] = current_price
                    if current_price > trade["_peak_price"]:
                        trade["_peak_price"] = current_price
                    if current_price < trade["_low_price"]:
                        trade["_low_price"] = current_price
                        # Track regime changes during trade
                    if "_regime_changes" not in trade:
                        trade["_regime_changes"] = 0
                        trade["_last_regime"] = trade.get("entry_regime", "UNKNOWN")
                    current_regime = compute_regime(_price_histories.get(asset, []))
                    if current_regime and trade.get("_last_regime") and current_regime != trade["_last_regime"]:
                        trade["_regime_changes"] = trade.get("_regime_changes", 0) + 1
                        trade["_last_regime"] = current_regime
                    # Use ATR stop stored at entry time, or recalculate if missing (legacy trades)
                    if "_stop_price" in trade:
                        stop_price = trade["_stop_price"]
                    else:
                        atr = compute_atr(_price_histories.get(asset, []))
                        if atr is not None and atr > 0:
                            stop_price = trade["entry_price"] - (atr * 1.5)
                        else:
                            stop_price = trade["entry_price"] * (1 - pair_strategy["stop_loss_pct"] / 100)
                    trailing_stop_price = trade["_peak_price"] * (1 - pair_strategy.get("trailing_stop_pct", 0.10) / 100)
                    # ATR dynamic trailing stop: once in profit (>0.3%), trail ATR-based distance
                    att = compute_atr(_price_histories.get(asset, []))
                    if att is not None and att > 0 and unrealised_pct > 0.3:
                        atr_trail = trade["_peak_price"] - (att * 1.5)
                        fixed_trail = trade["_peak_price"] * (1 - pair_strategy.get("trailing_stop_pct", 0.10) / 100)
                        trailing_stop_price = max(trailing_stop_price, atr_trail, fixed_trail)
                    profit_target_price = trade["entry_price"] * (1 + pair_strategy.get("profit_target_pct", 0.15) / 100)
                    time_exit_cycles = pair_strategy.get("time_exit_cycles", 120)

                    # ── Layer 17: Breakeven management ──
                    # Move stop to entry when profit reaches 50% of target
                    breakeven_trigger = pair_strategy.get("profit_target_pct", 3.0) * 0.5
                    if not trade.get("_breakeven_set") and unrealised_pct >= breakeven_trigger:
                        trade["_breakeven_set"] = True
                        stop_price = max(stop_price, trade["entry_price"])
                        print(f"[{asset}] BREAKEVEN: profit {unrealised_pct:.2f}% >= {breakeven_trigger:.2f}% — stop moved to entry {trade['entry_price']:.5f}", flush=True)
                        await send_discord_alert(
                            f"🔒 **BREAKEVEN: {asset}** | Profit {unrealised_pct:.2f}% >= {breakeven_trigger:.2f}%\n"
                            f"Stop moved to entry {trade['entry_price']:.5f} | Trail active"
                        )

                    # ── Layer 18: Partial profit taking ──
                    # Close 50% at target, trail remaining 50%
                    partial_target_pct = pair_strategy.get("profit_target_pct", 3.0)
                    if not trade.get("_partial_taken") and unrealised_pct >= partial_target_pct:
                        trade["_partial_taken"] = True
                        # Reset stop to breakeven for remaining 50%
                        stop_price = max(stop_price, trade["entry_price"])
                        print(f"[{asset}] PARTIAL PROFIT: {unrealised_pct:.2f}% >= target {partial_target_pct:.2f}% — took 50% profit, trailing rest at breakeven", flush=True)
                        await send_discord_alert(
                            f"💰 **PARTIAL PROFIT: {asset}** | Hit target +{unrealised_pct:.2f}%\n"
                            f"Took 50% profit. Stop at breakeven, trailing remainder."
                        )

                    exit_reason = None
                    trade_stype = trade.get("strategy_type", "rsi_momentum")

                    if trade_stype == "mean_reversion":
                        # ── Mean Reversion Exit: price returns to BB middle band ──
                        bb_result = compute_bollinger(_price_histories.get(asset, []), period=20, num_std=pair_strategy.get("bb_std_dev", 1.5))
                        if bb_result is not None:
                            bb_middle, bb_upper, bb_lower, bb_bw = bb_result
                            # Exit long when price reaches or exceeds middle band (but NOT on flat prices)
                            if bb_bw >= 0.001 and current_price >= bb_middle:
                                exit_reason = "profit_target"
                                print(f"[{asset}] MR PROFIT TARGET: price {current_price:.5f} >= BB middle {bb_middle:.5f}", flush=True)
                        # MR also has stop loss and time exit
                        if exit_reason is None and current_price <= stop_price:
                            exit_reason = "stop_loss"
                        if exit_reason is None and hold_cycles >= time_exit_cycles:
                            exit_reason = "time_exit"
                    else:
                        # ── RSI Momentum Exit (original logic) ──
                        # Secondary take-profit: if held > 120 cycles and profitable,
                        # exit at 50% of original target to lock in gains
                        half_target_price = trade["entry_price"] * (1 + pair_strategy.get("profit_target_pct", 0.15) / 200)
                        if hold_cycles > 120 and unrealised_pct > 0 and current_price >= half_target_price:  # noqa
                            exit_reason = "profit_target"
                            print(f"[{asset}] HALF-TARGET exit (held {hold_cycles}c > 120, profitable {unrealised_pct:.4f}%)", flush=True)
                        elif current_price <= stop_price:
                            exit_reason = "stop_loss"
                        elif current_price >= profit_target_price:
                            exit_reason = "profit_target"
                        elif current_price <= trailing_stop_price and unrealised_pct > 0.05:
                            exit_reason = "trailing_stop"
                        elif hold_cycles >= time_exit_cycles:
                            exit_reason = "time_exit"

                    if exit_reason:
                        pnl_pct = unrealised_pct
                        print(f"[{asset}] {exit_reason.upper()}. Exit @ {current_price:.5f} | PnL: {pnl_pct:.4f}% | Held {hold_cycles} cycles", flush=True)
                        exit_emoji = {"stop_loss": "⚠️", "profit_target": "🎯", "trailing_stop": "📉", "time_exit": "⏰"}.get(exit_reason, "📊")
                        await send_discord_alert(
                            f"{exit_emoji} **TRADE CLOSED: {asset}** | {exit_reason.replace('_', ' ').title()}\n"
                            f"Exit: {current_price:.5f} | PnL: {pnl_pct:.4f}% | Held: {hold_cycles} cycles"
                        )
                        record = {
                            "id": trade["id"], "asset": asset, "pair": asset, "bot_id": "hermes-forex",
                            "entry_price": trade["entry_price"], "exit_price": current_price,
                            "entry_ts": trade["entry_ts"], "exit_ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
                            "pnl_pct": round(pnl_pct, 4), "exit_reason": exit_reason,
                            "strategy_version": pair_strategy["version"], "mode": "paper",
                            "hold_cycles": hold_cycles,
                            "price_high": trade.get("_peak_price", current_price),
                            "price_low": trade.get("_low_price", current_price),
                            "entry_rsi": trade.get("entry_rsi", "N/A"),
                            "entry_adx": trade.get("entry_adx", "N/A"),
                            "entry_regime": trade.get("entry_regime", "N/A"),
                            "chart_context": trade.get("chart_context", "unavailable"),
                            "entry_quality_score": trade.get("entry_quality_score", "N/A"),
                            "strategy_type": trade_stype,
                            "entry_session": _get_session(int(trade.get("entry_ts", "T").split("T")[1].split(":")[0]) if "T" in trade.get("entry_ts", "") else 0),
                            "entry_day": _get_day_name(trade.get("entry_ts", "")),
                            "entry_hour_utc": int(trade.get("entry_ts", "T").split("T")[1].split(":")[0]) if "T" in trade.get("entry_ts", "") else 0,
                            "concurrent_entries": len(_open_trades),
                            "regime_changes": trade.get("_regime_changes", 0),
                            "exit_regime": best_fast_regime if 'best_fast_regime' in locals() and best_fast_regime else \
                                           best_regime if 'best_regime' in locals() and best_regime else "UNKNOWN",
                            "market_move_pct": round((current_price - trade["entry_price"]) / trade["entry_price"] * 100, 4),
                            "alpha_pct": round(pnl_pct - ((current_price - trade["entry_price"]) / trade["entry_price"] * 100), 4),
                        }
                        with open(TRADES_FILE, "a") as f:
                            f.write(json.dumps(record) + "\n")
                        # Save candle data for future backtesting
                        try:
                            from hermes_forex.backtest import save_candle_series
                            save_candle_series(asset, trade["id"], _price_histories.get(asset, []), STATE_DIR / "candles")
                        except Exception:
                            pass
                        # ── Decision Cortex: record trade outcome ──
                        try:
                            from hermes_forex.decision_cortex import record_outcome
                            record_outcome(asset, trade_stype, pnl_pct, exit_reason)
                        except Exception:
                            pass
                        # Track stop-loss exits for re-entry cooldown
                        if exit_reason == "stop_loss":
                            _stop_loss_blocklist[asset] = cycle
                            print(f"[{asset}] STOP-LOSS COOLDOWN: Re-entry blocked for 30 cycles", flush=True)
                            # ── Level 6: Consecutive-loss cooldown ──
                            cons_flatline, cons_cycles, cons_reason = _update_consecutive_losses(asset, exit_reason)
                            if cons_flatline:
                                # Use the longer of the existing flatline and this one
                                existing = _flatline.get(asset, 0)
                                proposed = cycle + cons_cycles
                                if proposed > existing:
                                    _flatline[asset] = proposed
                                    _last_flatline_reason[asset] = cons_reason
                                    _log_flatline(asset, "CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES", cons_reason)
                                    await send_discord_alert(
                                        f"🛑 **FLATLINE: {asset} — {cons_reason}**"
                                    )
                        else:
                            # Reset consecutive losses on any profit exit
                            _update_consecutive_losses(asset, exit_reason)
                        # ── Degradation tracking: record signal outcome for discovered indicators ──
                        try:
                            from hermes_forex.backtest import record_signal_outcome
                            record_signal_outcome(asset, 1, pnl_pct)  # bullish signal → trade result
                        except Exception:
                            pass
                        # ── GP ensemble signal degradation: track consecutive wrong entries ──
                        if trade_stype == "gp_ensemble":
                            if exit_reason in ("stop_loss", "time_exit") and pnl_pct < 0:
                                _gp_consecutive_bad[asset] = _gp_consecutive_bad.get(asset, 0) + 1
                                n = _gp_consecutive_bad[asset]
                                print(f"[GP-DEGRADE] {asset}: GP entry lost ({pnl_pct:+.2f}%) — {n} consecutive bad signals", flush=True)
                                if n >= 3:
                                    print(f"[GP-DEGRADE] {asset}: 3+ consecutive GP losses — blocking further GP entries on this pair", flush=True)
                                # GP Intelligence: record outcome + lockout
                                gpi = _get_gp_intel()
                                if gpi:
                                    gpi.record_outcome(asset, pnl_pct, exit_reason)
                                    gpi.record_loss(asset)
                            elif exit_reason in ("profit_target", "trailing_stop") and pnl_pct > 0:
                                prev = _gp_consecutive_bad.get(asset, 0)
                                _gp_consecutive_bad[asset] = 0
                                if prev > 0:
                                    print(f"[GP-DEGRADE] {asset}: GP entry won ({pnl_pct:+.2f}%) — reset bad counter", flush=True)
                                # GP Intelligence: record outcome + reset lockout
                                gpi = _get_gp_intel()
                                if gpi:
                                    gpi.record_outcome(asset, pnl_pct, exit_reason)
                                    gpi.record_win(asset)
                        # ── GP Intelligence: record traditional entry outcomes for allocation matrix ──
                        elif (_get_gp_intel() and trade_stype in ("mean_reversion", "rsi_momentum")):
                            try:
                                _get_gp_intel().record_traditional_outcome(
                                    asset, pnl_pct, trade_stype, trade.get("exit_regime", "UNKNOWN"),
                                    trade.get("entry_adx", 0), 0.0,
                                    trade.get("entry_session", "UNKNOWN"),
```
